27822.title: Abstentions and Social Networks in Congress
27822.zh_title: 国会中的弃权与社会网络
27822.authors: Marco Battaglini, Valerio Leone Sciabolazza, Eleonora Patacchini
27822.abstract: We study the extent to which personal connections among legislators influence abstentions in the U.S. Congress. Our analysis is conducted by observing representatives' abstention for the universe of roll call votes held on bills in the 109th-113th Congresses. Our results show that a legislator's propensity to abstain increases when the majority of his or her alumni connections abstains, even after controlling for other well-known predictors of abstention choices and a vast set of fixed effects. We further reveal that a legislator is more prone to abstain than to take sides when the demands from personal connections conflict with those of the legislator's party.
27822.zh_abstract: 我们研究了立法者之间的个人联系在多大程度上影响美国国会中的弃权行为。我们的分析通过观察第109届至第113届国会期间所有法案的唱名表决中代表的弃权情况进行。我们的结果表明，当立法者的大多数校友联系人都弃权时，该立法者弃权的倾向会增加，即使在控制了其他已知的弃权选择预测因素和大量固定效应之后也是如此。我们进一步揭示，当个人联系的要求与立法者所在政党的要求相冲突时，立法者更倾向于弃权而非选边站队。

27821.title: Trade and Geography
27821.abstract: This paper reviews recent research on geography and trade. One of the key empirical findings over the last decade has been the role of geography in shaping the distributional consequences of trade. One of the major theoretical advances has been the development of quantitative spatial models that incorporate both exogenous first-nature geography (natural endowments) and endogenous second-nature geography (the location choices of economic agents relative to one another) as determinants of the distribution of economic activity across space. These models are sufficiently rich to capture first-order features of the data, such as gravity equations for flows of goods and people. Yet they remain sufficiently tractable as to permit an analytical characterization of the properties of the general equilibrium and facilitate counterfactuals for realistic policy interventions. We distinguish between models of regions or systems of cities (where goods trade and migration take center stage) and models of the internal structure of cities (where commuting becomes relevant). We review some of key empirical predictions of both sets of theories and show that they have been remarkably successful in rationalizing the empirical findings from reduced-form research. Looking ahead, the combination of recent theoretical advances and novel geo-coded data on economic interactions at a fine spatial scale promises many interesting avenues for further research, including discriminating between alternative mechanisms for agglomeration, understanding the implications of new technologies for the organization of work, and assessing the causes, consequences and potential policy implications of spatial sorting.
27821.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了近期关于地理与贸易的研究。过去十年中一个关键的实证发现是地理在塑造贸易分配后果中的作用。一个主要的理论进展是定量空间模型的发展，该模型将外生的第一性地理（自然禀赋）和内生的第二性地理（经济主体相对于彼此的位置选择）都作为经济活动空间分布的决定因素。这些模型足够丰富，能够捕捉数据的一阶特征，例如商品和人员流动的引力方程。然而，它们仍然足够易于处理，以便对一般均衡的性质进行分析性刻画，并促进对现实政策干预的反事实分析。我们区分了区域或城市体系模型（其中商品贸易和迁移占据中心地位）和城市内部结构模型（其中通勤变得相关）。我们回顾了两类理论的一些关键实证预测，并表明它们在合理化简化形式研究的实证发现方面取得了显著成功。展望未来，近期理论进展与精细空间尺度上经济互动的新型地理编码数据的结合，为进一步研究提供了许多有趣的途径，包括区分集聚的替代机制、理解新技术对工作组织的影响，以及评估空间分类的原因、后果和潜在政策含义。

27820.title: Economic Agents as Imperfect Problem Solvers
27820.zh_title: 作为不完美问题解决者的经济主体
27820.abstract: We develop a tractable model of limited cognitive perception of the optimal policy function, with agents using costly reasoning effort to update beliefs about this optimal mapping of economic states into actions. A key result is that agents reason less (more) when observing usual (unusual) states, producing state- and history-dependent behavior. Our application is a standard incomplete markets model with ex-ante identical agents that hold no a-priori behavioral biases. The resulting ergodic distribution of actions and beliefs is characterized by “learning traps”, where locally stable dynamics of wealth generate “familiar” regions of the state space within which behavior appears to follow past-experience-based heuristics. We show qualitatively and quantitatively how these traps have empirically desirable properties: the marginal propensity to consume is higher, hand-to-mouth status is more frequent and persistent, and there is more wealth inequality than in the standard model.
27820.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个关于最优政策函数有限认知感知的可处理模型，其中主体使用昂贵的推理努力来更新关于经济状态到行动的最优映射的信念。一个关键结果是，主体在观察常见（不常见）状态时推理较少（较多），从而产生依赖于状态和历史的行为。我们的应用是一个标准的不完全市场模型，其中事前相同的主体没有任何先验的行为偏差。由此产生的行动和信念的遍历分布以“学习陷阱”为特征，其中财富的局部稳定动态产生了状态空间的“熟悉”区域，在这些区域内，行为似乎遵循基于过去经验的启发式方法。我们从定性和定量角度展示了这些陷阱如何具有经验上理想的属性：边际消费倾向更高，手到口状态更频繁且更持久，并且财富不平等程度比标准模型更大。
27820.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：C11, D83, D91, E21, E71

27819.title: Monetary Policy Surprises and Exchange Rate Behavior
27819.zh_title: 货币政策冲击与汇率行为
27819.authors: Refet S. Gürkaynak, A. Hakan Kara, Burçin Kısacıkoğlu, Sang Seok Lee
27819.abstract: Central banks unexpectedly tightening policy rates often observe the exchange value of their currency depreciate, rather than appreciate as predicted by standard models. We document this for Fed and ECB policy days using event-studies and ask whether an information effect, where the public attributes the policy surprise to an unobserved state of the economy that the central bank is signaling by its policy may explain the abnormality. It turns out that many informational assumptions make a standard two-country New Keynesian model match this behavior. To identify the particular mechanism, we condition on multiple asset prices in the event-study and model implications for these. We find that there is heterogeneity in this dimension in the event-study and no model with a single regime can match the evidence. Further, even after conditioning on possible information effects driving longer term interest rates, there appear to be other drivers of exchange rates. Our results show that existing models have a long way to go in reconciling event-study analysis with model-based mechanisms of asset pricing.
27819.zh_abstract: 中央银行意外收紧政策利率时，通常观察到其货币的汇率贬值，而不是像标准模型预测的那样升值。我们通过事件研究记录了美联储和欧洲央行政策日的这一现象，并探讨信息效应（即公众将政策冲击归因于中央银行通过其政策信号传递的未观察到的经济状态）是否可以解释这种异常。结果表明，许多信息假设使标准的两个国家新凯恩斯模型能够匹配这种行为。为了识别特定机制，我们在事件研究中以多种资产价格为条件，并模拟这些资产价格的模型含义。我们发现事件研究中存在这一维度的异质性，并且没有单一机制模型能够匹配证据。此外，即使在考虑了可能驱动长期利率的信息效应之后，似乎还存在其他驱动汇率的因素。我们的结果表明，现有模型在将事件研究分析与基于模型的资产定价机制相协调方面还有很长的路要走。
27819.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E43, E44, E52, E58, G14

27818.title: On the Origins of Gender-Biased Behavior: The Role of Explicit and Implicit Stereotypes
27818.zh_title: 论性别偏见行为的起源：显性和隐性刻板印象的作用
27818.authors: Eliana Avitzour, Adi Choen, Daphna Joel, Victor Lavy
27818.abstract: This study examines the role of implicit and explicit stereotypes behind gender-discriminatory behavior. The empirical context is the grading discriminatory behavior of math teachers in experimental settings. Previous observational studies demonstrated that math teachers show gender bias when grading papers. The mechanisms behind this behavior are mostly unexplored. We asked teachers to grade gender-manipulated exam papers and measured their grading behavior and implicit and explicit gender stereotypes. We found that implicit gender stereotypes and underestimating own implicit stereotypes were associated with boy-favoring grading behavior. Reducing implicit gender stereotypes and exposing teachers to their implicit biases may promote gender equality in schools.
27818.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了性别歧视行为背后的隐性和显性刻板印象的作用。实证背景是实验环境中数学教师的评分歧视行为。先前的观察性研究表明，数学教师在批改试卷时表现出性别偏见。这种行为背后的机制大多未被探索。我们要求教师批改性别操纵的考试试卷，并测量他们的评分行为以及隐性和显性性别刻板印象。我们发现，隐性性别刻板印象和低估自身隐性刻板印象与偏向男孩的评分行为相关。减少隐性性别刻板印象并让教师接触其隐性偏见可能促进学校中的性别平等。

27817.title: Do Black and Indigenous Communities Receive their Fair Share of Vaccines Under the 2018 CDC Guidelines?
27817.zh_title: 根据2018年CDC指南，黑人和原住民社区是否获得了公平份额的疫苗？
27817.authors: Parag A. Pathak, Harald Schmidt, Adam Solomon, Edwin Song, Tayfun Sönmez, M. Utku Ünver
27817.abstract: A major focus of debate about rationing guidelines for COVID-19 vaccines is whether and how to prioritize access for minority populations that have been particularly affected by the pandemic, and been the subject of historical and structural disadvantage, particularly Black and Indigenous individuals. We simulate the 2018 CDC Vaccine Allocation guidelines using data from the American Community Survey under different assumptions on total vaccine supply. Black and Indigenous individuals combined receive a higher share of vaccines compared to their population share for all assumptions on total vaccine supply. However, their vaccine share under the 2018 CDC guidelines is considerably lower than their share of COVID-19 deaths and age-adjusted deaths. We then simulate one method to incorporate disadvantage in vaccine allocation via a reserve system. In a reserve system, units are placed into categories and units reserved for a category give preferential treatment to individuals from that category. Using the Area Deprivation Index (ADI) as a proxy for disadvantage, we show that a 40% high-ADI reserve increases the number of vaccines allocated to Black or Indigenous individuals, with a share that approaches their COVID-19 death share when there are about 75 million units. Our findings illustrate that whether an allocation is equitable depends crucially on the benchmark and highlight the importance of considering the expected distribution of outcomes from implementing vaccine allocation guidelines.
27817.zh_abstract: 关于COVID-19疫苗配给指南的辩论焦点之一是，是否以及如何优先为受疫情影响特别严重且遭受历史和结构性劣势的少数群体（特别是黑人和原住民个体）提供疫苗。我们使用美国社区调查的数据，在总疫苗供应的不同假设下模拟了2018年CDC疫苗分配指南。在所有总疫苗供应假设下，黑人和原住民个体合计获得的疫苗份额高于其人口份额。然而，根据2018年CDC指南，他们的疫苗份额远低于其COVID-19死亡人数和年龄调整后死亡人数的份额。然后，我们模拟了一种通过储备系统将劣势纳入疫苗分配的方法。在储备系统中，单位被分为不同类别，为某一类别保留的单位给予该类别个体优先待遇。使用区域剥夺指数作为劣势的代理指标，我们表明，40%的高区域剥夺指数储备增加了分配给黑人或原住民个体的疫苗数量，当约有7500万单位时，其份额接近其COVID-19死亡份额。我们的研究结果表明，分配是否公平关键取决于基准，并强调了考虑实施疫苗分配指南预期结果分布的重要性。

27816.title: My Taxes are Too Darn High: Why Do Households Protest their Taxes?
27816.zh_title: 我的税太高了：为什么家庭会抗议他们的税收？
27816.authors: Brad C. Nathan, Ricardo Perez-Truglia, Alejandro Zentner
27816.abstract: In the United States and many other countries, taxpayers can file a protest to legally reduce their property taxes. While tax protests can provide a unique opportunity to study the (un)willingness to pay taxes, they have received little attention from researchers. To fill that gap, we study what motivates households to protest their property taxes. Using a field experiment and a quasi-experiment, we show that both expected savings and filing frictions play significant roles. We estimate the magnitude of filing frictions using a money metric. We also discuss how low-cost interventions targeted at disadvantaged groups can mitigate existing economic and racial disparities in the system of tax appeals.
27816.zh_abstract: 在美国和许多其他国家，纳税人可以提出抗议以合法减少其财产税。虽然税收抗议为研究（不）愿意纳税提供了独特机会，但研究人员对此关注甚少。为填补这一空白，我们研究了促使家庭抗议其财产税的因素。通过一项现场实验和一项准实验，我们表明预期节省和申请摩擦都起着重要作用。我们使用货币度量估计了申请摩擦的大小。我们还讨论了针对弱势群体的低成本干预措施如何能够减轻税收上诉系统中现有的经济和种族差异。
27816.meta: Programs：LE, PE, POL；JEL：C93, H2, H26, Z13

27815.title: Liquidity Transformation and Fragility in the US Banking Sector
27815.zh_title: 美国银行业部门的流动性转换与脆弱性
27815.authors: Qi Chen, Itay Goldstein, Zeqiong Huang, Rahul Vashishtha
27815.abstract: A key role of banks is liquidity transformation, which is also thought to create fragility, as uninsured depositors face an incentive to withdraw money before others (a so-called panic run). Despite much theoretical work, there has not been much empirical evidence establishing this mechanism. In this paper, we provide the first large-scale evidence of this mechanism. Banks that perform more liquidity transformation exhibit higher fragility, manifested by stronger sensitivities of uninsured deposit flows to bank performance and greater levels of uninsured deposit outflows when performance is poor. We also explore the effects of deposit insurance and systemic risk.
27815.zh_abstract: 银行的一个关键作用是流动性转换，这被认为也会造成脆弱性，因为未投保储户面临在他人之前提取资金的激励（所谓的恐慌性挤兑）。尽管有大量理论工作，但尚未有太多实证证据确立这一机制。在本文中，我们提供了这一机制的首个大规模证据。进行更多流动性转换的银行表现出更高的脆弱性，表现为未投保存款流动对银行绩效的敏感性更强，以及在绩效不佳时未投保存款流出水平更高。我们还探讨了存款保险和系统性风险的影响。

27814.title: Unemployment Disrupts Sleep
27814.abstract: Although there is a substantial literature indicating that unemployment and joblessness have profound adverse impacts on individuals’ health and wellbeing, there is relatively little evidence of their impact on sleep. Using data for over 3.5 million individuals in the United States over the period 2006-2019 from the Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System (BRFSS) survey series we show sleep disruption patterns that vary by labor market status. We look at sleep measured by hours in a day and days in a month and whether sleep is disturbed over a fortnight, as indicated by problems falling or staying asleep or staying asleep too much. We find the short-term unemployed suffer more short and long sleep than the employed and are more likely to suffer from disturbed sleep. These problems are greater still for the long-term unemployed and for the jobless who say they are unable to work.
27814.zh_abstract: 尽管有大量文献表明失业和无业对个人的健康和福祉有深远的负面影响，但关于其对睡眠影响的证据相对较少。使用2006-2019年间美国行为风险因素监测系统调查系列中超过350万个体的数据，我们展示了因劳动力市场状况而异的睡眠中断模式。我们考察了以一天中的小时数和一个月中的天数衡量的睡眠，以及两周内睡眠是否受到干扰，如入睡或保持睡眠困难或睡眠过多所指示。我们发现，短期失业者比就业者经历更多短睡眠和长睡眠，并且更可能遭受睡眠干扰。对于长期失业者和声称无法工作的无业者来说，这些问题更为严重。

27813.title: The Contagion Externality of a Superspreading Event: The Sturgis Motorcycle Rally and COVID-19
27813.zh_title: 超级传播事件的传染外部性：斯特吉斯摩托车集会与COVID-19
27813.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Andrew I. Friedson, Drew McNichols, Joseph J. Sabia
27813.abstract: Large in-person gatherings without social distancing and with individuals who have traveled outside the local area are classified as the “highest risk” for COVID-19 spread by the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC). Between August 7 and August 16, 2020, nearly 500,000 motorcycle enthusiasts converged on Sturgis, South Dakota for its annual motorcycle rally. Large crowds, coupled with minimal mask-wearing and social distancing by attendees, raised concerns that this event could serve as a COVID-19 “super-spreader.” This study is the first to explore the impact of this event on social distancing and the spread of COVID-19. First, using anonymized cell phone data from SafeGraph, Inc. we document that (i) smartphone pings from non-residents, and (ii) foot traffic at restaurants and bars, retail establishments, entertainment venues, hotels and campgrounds each rose substantially in the census block groups hosting Sturgis rally events. Stay-at-home behavior among local residents, as measured by median hours spent at home, fell. Second, using data from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) and a synthetic control approach, we show that by September 2, a month following the onset of the Rally, COVID-19 cases increased by approximately 6 to 7 cases per 1,000 population in its home county of Meade. Finally, difference-in-differences (dose response) estimates show that following the Sturgis event, counties that contributed the highest inflows of rally attendees experienced a 7.0 to 12.5 percent increase in COVID-19 cases relative to counties that did not contribute inflows. Descriptive evidence suggests these effects may be muted in states with stricter mitigation policies (i.e., restrictions on bar/restaurant openings, mask-wearing mandates). We conclude that the Sturgis Motorcycle Rally generated public health costs of as much as $\$12.2$ billion.
27813.zh_abstract: 美国疾病控制与预防中心将没有社交距离且参与者来自当地以外地区的大型面对面聚会归类为COVID-19传播的“最高风险”。2020年8月7日至16日，近50万名摩托车爱好者聚集在南达科他州的斯特吉斯参加其年度摩托车集会。大量人群，加上参与者很少佩戴口罩和保持社交距离，引发了人们对这一事件可能成为COVID-19“超级传播者”的担忧。本研究首次探讨了这一事件对社交距离和COVID-19传播的影响。首先，使用SafeGraph公司的匿名手机数据，我们记录了（i）非居民的手机信号，以及（ii）举办斯特吉斯集会活动的普查区组中餐馆和酒吧、零售场所、娱乐场所、酒店和露营地的客流量均大幅上升。当地居民的居家行为（以在家中的中位小时数衡量）下降。其次，使用疾病控制与预防中心的数据和合成控制方法，我们表明，到9月2日，即集会开始后一个月，其所在县米德县的COVID-19病例每1000人增加了约6至7例。最后，双重差分（剂量反应）估计显示，在斯特吉斯事件之后，贡献了最多集会参与者流入的县，相对于没有贡献流入的县，COVID-19病例增加了7.0%至12.5%。描述性证据表明，在采取更严格缓解政策（即限制酒吧/餐厅营业、强制佩戴口罩）的州，这些影响可能被削弱。我们得出结论，斯特吉斯摩托车集会产生了高达122亿美元的公共卫生成本。

27812.title: The Changing Dimensions of Child Development
27812.zh_title: 幼儿早期发展：父母投资与不同维度的动态变化
27812.authors: Orazio Attanasio, Raquel Bernal, Michele Giannola, Milagros Nores
27812.abstract: This paper uses the data on child development collected around the evaluation of a nursery program to estimate the details of the process of human development. We model development as made of three latent factors, reflecting health, cognitive and socio-emotional skills. We observe children from age 1 to age 7. We assume that, at each age, these factors interact among themselves and with a variety of other inputs to determine the level of development at following ages. Relative to other studies, the richness of the data we use allows us to: (i) let the dynamics be rich and flexible; (ii) let each factors play a role in the production of any other factor; (iii) estimate age-specific functional forms; (iv) treated parental investment as an endogenous input. We find that the dynamics of the process can be richer than usually assumed, which has important implications for the degree of persistence of different inputs in time. Persistence also changes with age. This has important implications for the targeting of investment and interventions, and the identification of windows of opportunities. The endogeneity of investment is also important.
27812.zh_abstract: 本文利用围绕一项托儿项目评估收集的儿童发展数据，来估计人类发展过程的细节。我们将发展建模为由三个潜在因素构成，分别反映健康、认知和社会情感技能。我们观察从1岁到7岁的儿童。我们假设，在每个年龄段，这些因素之间以及它们与各种其他投入相互作用，决定后续年龄段的发展水平。与其他研究相比，我们所用数据的丰富性使我们能够：(i) 使动态过程丰富且灵活；(ii) 让每个因素在任何其他因素的生产中发挥作用；(iii) 估计特定年龄的函数形式；(iv) 将父母投资视为内生投入。我们发现，该过程的动态可能比通常假设的更为丰富，这对不同投入在时间上的持续程度具有重要影响。持续性也随年龄而变化。这对投资和干预的针对性以及机会窗口的识别具有重要意义。投资的内生性也很重要。
27812.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED；JEL：I15, I25, I32, J13, J24, O15

27811.title: What Explains the Gap in Welfare Use among Immigrants and Natives?
27811.zh_title: 什么解释了移民与本地人之间福利使用的差距？
27811.authors: Xiaoning Huang, Neeraj Kaushal, Julia Shu-Huah Wang
27811.abstract: We investigate the gap in welfare use between immigrants and natives over a 24-year period using the Annual Social and Economic Supplement of the Current Population Survey from 1995-2018, spanning periods of economic recessions and recoveries, changes in welfare policy regimes, and policies towards immigrants. A novel contribution of our research is to adopt the Oaxaca-Blinder decomposition analysis to study the effects of demographic factors, macroeconomic trends and policy on welfare use gap between immigrants and natives. Our analysis leads to three main findings: one, if immigrants had the same demographic characteristics as natives their participation in means-tested programs would have been much less overall and much below those of natives. This finding holds true across broader measures of welfare receipt capturing cash and near cash programs and health insurance as well as participation in five specific safety net programs. It also holds true across periods of economic recessions and recovery. Second, we find evidence that the business cycle impacts immigrant and native welfare participation differently. Immigrant participations in Temporary Assistance to Needy Families, Supplemental Nutritional Assistance Program and State Children’s Health Insurance Program are more sensitive to the business cycle than native participations. Three, we find that changes in program eligibility explain only a modest proportion of the immigrant-native gap in welfare use. A possible explanation for this finding is that changes in eligibility rules have affected only specific immigrant populations (e.g. new immigrants) whereas our analysis pertains to all immigrants.
27811.zh_abstract: 我们利用1995年至2018年当前人口调查的年度社会与经济补充数据，跨越经济衰退与复苏时期、福利政策体制变化以及针对移民的政策，研究了24年间移民与本地人之间福利使用的差距。我们研究的一个新颖贡献是采用Oaxaca-Blinder分解分析来研究人口因素、宏观经济趋势和政策对移民与本地人福利使用差距的影响。我们的分析得出三个主要发现：第一，如果移民具有与本地人相同的人口特征，他们参与经济状况调查项目的总体程度会低得多，并且远低于本地人。这一发现适用于更广泛的福利领取衡量指标，包括现金和近似现金项目以及健康保险，也适用于五个特定安全网项目的参与情况。这一发现在经济衰退和复苏时期同样成立。第二，我们发现证据表明商业周期对移民和本地人福利参与的影响不同。移民在贫困家庭临时援助、补充营养援助计划和州儿童健康保险计划中的参与比本地人更敏感于商业周期。第三，我们发现项目资格变化仅解释了移民与本地人福利使用差距的一小部分。这一发现的一个可能解释是，资格规则的变化仅影响了特定的移民群体（例如新移民），而我们的分析涉及所有移民。

27810.title: Token-Based Platform Finance
27810.authors: Lin William Cong, Ye Li, Neng Wang
27810.abstract: We develop a dynamic model of platform economy where tokens serve as a means of payments among platform users and are issued to ﬁnance investment in platform productivity. Tokens are optimally issued to reward platform owners when the productivity-normalized token supply is low and burnt to boost the franchise value when the productivity-normalized normalized supply is high. Although token price is determined in a liquid market, the platform’s ﬁnancial constraint generates an endogenous token issuance cost, causing underinvestment through the conﬂict of interest between insiders (platform owners) and outsiders (users). Blockchain technology mitigates underinvestment by addressing the platform’s time-inconsistency problem.
27810.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个平台经济的动态模型，其中代币作为平台用户之间的支付手段，并被发行以资助平台生产力的投资。当生产力标准化后的代币供应量较低时，代币被最优发行以奖励平台所有者；当生产力标准化后的供应量较高时，代币被销毁以提升特许经营权价值。尽管代币价格在流动性市场中决定，但平台的金融约束产生了内生的代币发行成本，通过内部人（平台所有者）与外部人（用户）之间的利益冲突导致投资不足。区块链技术通过解决平台的时间不一致性问题来缓解投资不足。

27809.title: The Fed Takes on Corporate Credit Risk: An Analysis of the Efficacy of the SMCCF
27809.zh_title: 美联储承担企业信用风险：二级市场企业信贷便利有效性分析
27809.authors: Simon Gilchrist, Bin Wei, Vivian Z. Yue, Egon Zakrajšek
27809.abstract: We evaluate the efficacy of the Secondary Market Corporate Credit Facility (SMCCF), a program designed to stabilize the corporate bond market in the wake of the Covid-19 shock. The Fed announced the SMCCF on March 23 and expanded the program on April 9. Regression discontinuity estimates imply that these announcements reduced credit spreads on bonds eligible for purchase 70 basis points. We refine this analysis by constructing a sample of bonds—issued by the same set of companies—which differ in their SMCCF eligibility. A diff-in-diff analysis shows that both announcements had large effects on credit spreads, narrowing spreads 20 basis points on eligible bonds relative to their ineligible counterparts within the same set of issuers across the two announcement periods. The March 23 announcement also reduced bid-ask spreads ten basis points within ten days of the announcement. By lowering credit spreads and improving liquidity, the April 9 announcement had an especially pronounced effect on “fallen angels.” The actual purchases lowered credit spreads by an additional five basis points and bid-ask spreads by two basis points. These results confirm that the SMCCF made it easier for companies to borrow in the corporate bond market.
27809.zh_abstract: 我们评估了二级市场企业信贷便利（SMCCF）的有效性，该计划旨在在新冠疫情冲击后稳定企业债券市场。美联储于3月23日宣布SMCCF，并于4月9日扩大了该计划。断点回归估计表明，这些公告使符合购买条件的债券的信用利差降低了70个基点。我们通过构建一个由同一组公司发行的债券样本——这些债券在SMCCF资格上有所不同——来完善这一分析。双重差分分析显示，两次公告都对信用利差产生了较大影响，在两个公告期内，相对于同一发行人中不符合条件的债券，符合条件的债券的利差收窄了20个基点。3月23日的公告还在公告后十天内将买卖价差降低了10个基点。通过降低信用利差和改善流动性，4月9日的公告对“堕落天使”产生了特别显著的影响。实际购买使信用利差额外降低了5个基点，买卖价差降低了2个基点。这些结果证实，SMCCF使公司更容易在企业债券市场借款。
27809.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E44, E58, G2

27808.title: On the Origins of the Idea of Ending Poverty
27808.zh_title: 论终结贫困思想的起源
27808.abstract: The late 18th century saw the intellectual germ of the idea of “ending poverty,” but the idea did not get far in economics or policy making until much more recently. Over the 19th century, poverty rates fell substantially in Western Europe and North America, and we started to see mainstream advocates of ending chronic poverty, and policies for doing so. There was an explosion of interest in the idea from around 1960, with policy responses in many countries, including America. In the post-Colonial period, the newly independent states were keen to see an end to poverty. From the 1990s, development agencies began to identify this as their overarching objective. The U.N.’s first Millennium Development Goal (MDG1) of halving the 1990 poverty rate by 2015 was achieved ahead of time. The U.N.’s Sustainable Development Goals came to include ending extreme poverty by 2030. This is more ambitious than MDG1, and more politically challenging. Economic growth in poor countries is likely to remain important, but the policy emphasis has shifted to redistributive interventions, though these will require a deeper reach to the poorest if we are to see the end of poverty, judged by any chosen poverty line.
27808.zh_abstract: 18世纪末，“终结贫困”这一思想在知识界萌芽，但直到最近，该思想在经济学或政策制定中才取得较大进展。在整个19世纪，西欧和北美的贫困率大幅下降，我们开始看到主流倡导终结长期贫困的观点以及相应的政策。大约从1960年起，人们对这一思想的兴趣激增，许多国家（包括美国）都采取了政策回应。在后殖民时期，新独立的国家渴望终结贫困。从20世纪90年代起，发展机构开始将此确定为其首要目标。联合国第一个千年发展目标（MDG1）——到2015年将1990年的贫困率减半——已提前实现。联合国的可持续发展目标进而包括到2030年终结极端贫困。这比MDG1更具雄心，在政治上也更具挑战性。贫困国家的经济增长可能仍然重要，但政策重点已转向再分配干预措施，不过，如果我们要以任何选定的贫困线为标准终结贫困，这些措施需要更深入地触及最贫困人群。

27807.title: Reservation Wages and Workers’ Valuation of Job Flexibility: Evidence from a Natural Field Experiment
27807.zh_title: 保留工资与工人对工作灵活性的估值：来自自然现场实验的证据
27807.authors: Kuan-Ming Chen, Claire Ding, John A. List, Magne Mogstad
27807.abstract: Recent changes in labor arrangements have increased interest in estimating and understanding the value of job flexibility. We leverage a large natural field experiment at Uber to create exogenous variation in expected market wages across individuals and over time. Combining this experiment with high frequency panel data on wages and individual work decisions, we document how labor supply responds to exogenous changes in expected market wages in a setting with virtually no restrictions on driver labor allocation. We find that there is i) systematic heterogeneity in labor supply responses both across drivers and within a driver over time, ii) significant fixed costs of beginning a shift, and iii) high rider demand when it is costly for drivers to work. These three findings motivate a model of labor supply with heterogenous preferences over work schedules, adjustment costs, and statistical dependence between market wages and the costs of driving. We recover the labor supply elasticities and reservation wages of this dynamic labor supply model via a combination of experimental estimates and other data moments. We then perform counterfactual analyses that allow us to examine how preference heterogeneity and adjustment costs influence the responses of workers' to wage incentives as well as infer drivers' willingness to pay for the ability to customize and adjust their work schedule. We also show that a static approach to the driver's dynamic problem delivers materially different estimates of workers' labor supply elasticities and their value of job flexibility.
27807.zh_abstract: 近期劳动安排的变化增加了对估计和理解工作灵活性价值的兴趣。我们利用Uber的一个大规模自然现场实验，在个体间和时间上创造预期市场工资的外生变化。将该实验与关于工资和个人工作决策的高频面板数据相结合，我们记录了在司机劳动分配几乎没有限制的环境中，劳动供给如何响应预期市场工资的外生变化。我们发现：(i) 劳动供给响应在司机之间以及同一司机随时间推移均存在系统性异质性；(ii) 开始一个班次存在显著的固定成本；(iii) 当司机工作成本高昂时，乘客需求很高。这三个发现激发了一个劳动供给模型，该模型包含对工作安排偏好的异质性、调整成本以及市场工资与驾驶成本之间的统计依赖性。我们通过实验估计和其他数据矩的组合，恢复了这一动态劳动供给模型的劳动供给弹性和保留工资。然后，我们进行反事实分析，使我们能够检验偏好异质性和调整成本如何影响工人对工资激励的响应，并推断司机为获得定制和调整工作安排的能力而愿意支付的金额。我们还表明，对司机动态问题的静态方法会得出关于工人劳动供给弹性及其工作灵活性价值的不同估计。

27806.title: Measuring the Cost of Living in Mexico and the US
27806.zh_title: 衡量墨西哥和美国的生活成本
27806.authors: David O. Argente, Chang-Tai Hsieh, Munseob Lee
27806.abstract: Cross-country price indexes are crucial to compare living standards between countries and to measure global inequality. An accurate measurement of these price indexes is a difficult task because of the lack of accurate data on the consumption patterns of different countries. We construct a unique data on prices and quantities for consumer packaged goods matched at the barcode-level across the United States and Mexico. We estimate that the Mexican real consumption relative to the United States is larger than previously estimated. We identify heterogeneity in shopping behavior, quality of products, and variety availability as important sources of bias in international price comparisons.
27806.zh_abstract: 跨国价格指数对于比较国家间生活水平和衡量全球不平等至关重要。由于缺乏不同国家消费模式的准确数据，准确衡量这些价格指数是一项艰巨的任务。我们构建了一个独特的、按条形码级别在美国和墨西哥之间匹配的消费品价格和数量数据集。我们估计，墨西哥相对于美国的实际消费比先前估计的要大。我们识别出购物行为、产品质量和品种可用性的异质性是国际价格比较中偏差的重要来源。
27806.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, IFM, ITI, PR；JEL：E0, F0, O0

27805.title: Disease, Downturns, and Wellbeing: Economic History and the Long-Run Impacts of COVID-19
27805.zh_title: 疾病、经济衰退与福祉：经济史与COVID-19的长期影响
27805.abstract: How might COVID-19 affect human capital and wellbeing in the long run? The COVID-19 pandemic has already imposed a heavy human cost—taken together, this public health crisis and its attendant economic downturn appear poised to dwarf the scope, scale, and disruptiveness of most modern pandemics. What evidence we do have about other modern pandemics is largely limited to short-run impacts. Consequently, recent experience can do little to help us anticipate and respond to COVID-19’s potential long-run impact on individuals over decades and even generations. History, however, offers a solution. Historical crises offer closer analogues to COVID-19 in each of its key dimensions—as a global pandemic, as a global recession—and offer the runway necessary to study the life-course and intergenerational outcomes. In this paper, we review the evidence on the long-run effects on health, labor, and human capital of both historical pandemics (with a focus on the 1918 Influenza Pandemic) and historical recessions (with a focus on the Great Depression). We conclude by discussing how past crises can inform our approach to COVID-19—helping tell us what to look for, what to prepare for, and what data we ought to collect now.
27805.zh_abstract: COVID-19可能如何长期影响人力资本和福祉？COVID-19大流行已经造成了沉重的人员代价——总体而言，这场公共卫生危机及其伴随的经济衰退似乎将使大多数现代大流行的范围、规模和破坏性相形见绌。我们关于其他现代大流行的现有证据大多局限于短期影响。因此，近期的经验几乎无助于我们预测和应对COVID-19对个人数十年甚至几代人的潜在长期影响。然而，历史提供了一个解决方案。历史危机在COVID-19的每个关键维度——作为全球大流行、作为全球衰退——上都提供了更接近的类比，并提供了研究生命历程和代际结果所需的足够时间跨度。在本文中，我们回顾了历史大流行（重点关注1918年流感大流行）和历史衰退（重点关注大萧条）对健康、劳动和人力资本的长期影响的证据。最后，我们讨论了过去的危机如何为我们的COVID-19应对方法提供信息——帮助我们了解应该关注什么、准备什么以及现在应该收集哪些数据。
27805.meta: Programs：DAE；JEL：I1, I3, J1, J6, N1, N3

27804.title: Is the Rise in Illicit Opioids Affecting Labor Supply and Disability Claiming Rates?
27804.zh_title: 非法阿片类药物增加是否影响劳动力供给和残疾申请率？
27804.abstract: There is considerable interest in understanding the broader effects of the opioid crisis on labor supply and social insurance programs in the United States. This paper examines how the recent transition of the opioid crisis from prescription opioids to more prevalent misuse of illicit opioids, such as heroin and fentanyl, altered labor supply behavior and disability insurance claiming rates. We exploit differential geographic exposure to the reformulation of OxyContin, the largest reduction in access to abusable prescription opioids to date, to study the effects of substitution to illicit markets. We observe meaningful reductions in labor supply measured in terms of employment-to-population ratios, hours worked, and earnings. We also find significant increases in disability applications and beneficiaries. These labor supply and disability insurance shifts begin immediately after reformulation and are uniquely associated with pre-reformulation rates of OxyContin misuse, not rates of broader pain reliever misuse.
27804.zh_abstract: 理解阿片类药物危机对美国劳动力供给和社会保险计划的广泛影响备受关注。本文考察了阿片类药物危机从处方阿片类药物向更普遍滥用非法阿片类药物（如海洛因和芬太尼）的近期转变如何改变了劳动力供给行为和残疾保险申请率。我们利用奥施康定（OxyContin）配方改革（迄今为止对可滥用处方阿片类药物获取的最大限制）所导致的地理差异暴露，来研究向非法市场替代的影响。我们观察到以就业人口比、工作时间和收入衡量的劳动力供给出现显著下降。我们还发现残疾申请和受益人数显著增加。这些劳动力供给和残疾保险的转变在配方改革后立即开始，并且与改革前奥施康定滥用率独特相关，而非更广泛的止痛药滥用率。

27803.title: Linguistic Metrics for Patent Disclosure: Evidence from University Versus Corporate Patents
27803.zh_title: 专利披露的语言学度量：来自大学与企业专利的证据
27803.authors: Nancy Kong, Uwe Dulleck, Adam B. Jaffe, Shupeng Sun, Sowmya Vajjala
27803.abstract: This paper proposes a novel approach to measure disclosure in patent applications using algorithms from computational linguistics. Borrowing methods from the literature on second language acquisition, we analyze core linguistic features of 40,949 U.S. applications in three patent categories related to nanotechnology, batteries, and electricity from 2000 to 2019. Relying on the expectation that universities have more incentives to disclose their inventions than corporations for either incentive reasons or for different source documents that patent attorneys can draw on, we confirm the relevance and usefulness of the linguistic measures by showing that university patents are more readable. Combining the multiple measures using principal component analysis, we find that the gap in disclosure is 0.4 SD, with a wider gap between top applicants. Our results do not change after accounting for the heterogeneity of inventions by controlling for cited-patent fixed effects. We also explore whether one pathway by which corporate patents become less readable is use of multiple examples to mask the “best mode” of inventions. By confirming that computational linguistic measures are useful indicators of readability of patents, we suggest that the disclosure function of patents can be explored empirically in a way that has not previously been feasible.
27803.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种使用计算语言学算法衡量专利申请中披露程度的新方法。借鉴第二语言习得文献中的方法，我们分析了2000年至2019年间与纳米技术、电池和电力相关的三个专利类别中40,949件美国申请的核心语言特征。基于大学比企业更有动机披露其发明（无论是出于激励原因还是专利律师可参考的不同源文件）的预期，我们通过显示大学专利更具可读性，证实了这些语言度量的相关性和有用性。使用主成分分析结合多种度量，我们发现披露差距为0.4个标准差，且顶尖申请人之间的差距更大。在通过控制被引专利固定效应来考虑发明的异质性后，我们的结果没有改变。我们还探讨了企业专利可读性降低的一个可能途径是使用多个示例来掩盖发明的“最佳模式”。通过确认计算语言学度量是专利可读性的有用指标，我们建议专利的披露功能可以以前不可行的方式进行实证探索。

27802.title: On the Use of Outcome Tests for Detecting Bias in Decision Making
27802.zh_title: 关于使用结果检验检测决策中的偏见
27802.authors: Ivan A. Canay, Magne Mogstad, Jack Mountjoy
27802.abstract: The decisions of judges, lenders, journal editors, and other gatekeepers often lead to significant disparities across affected groups. An important question is whether, and to what extent, these group-level disparities are driven by relevant differences in underlying individual characteristics, or by biased decision makers. Becker (1957, 1993) proposed an outcome test of bias based on differences in post-decision outcomes across groups, inspiring a large and growing empirical literature. The goal of our paper is to offer a methodological blueprint for empirical work that seeks to use outcome tests to detect bias. We show that models of decision making underpinning outcome tests can be usefully recast as Roy models, since heterogeneous potential outcomes enter directly into the decision maker's choice equation. Different members of the Roy model family, however, are distinguished by the tightness of the link between potential outcomes and decisions. We show that these distinctions have important implications for defining bias, deriving logically valid outcome tests of such bias, and identifying the marginal outcomes that the test requires.
27802.zh_abstract: 法官、贷款人、期刊编辑和其他守门人的决策常常导致受影响群体间的显著差异。一个重要问题是，这些群体层面的差异在多大程度上是由潜在个体特征的相关差异驱动，还是由有偏见的决策者造成。Becker（1957, 1993）提出了一种基于群体间决策后结果差异的偏见结果检验，激发了大量且不断增长的实证文献。本文的目标是为寻求使用结果检验检测偏见的实证工作提供方法论蓝图。我们表明，支撑结果检验的决策模型可以有效地重新表述为Roy模型，因为异质性的潜在结果直接进入决策者的选择方程。然而，Roy模型家族的不同成员通过潜在结果与决策之间联系的紧密程度来区分。我们表明，这些区别对于定义偏见、推导此类偏见的逻辑有效结果检验以及识别检验所需的边际结果具有重要含义。
27802.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C21, C26, C51, J15, J16, J71, K14, K42

27801.title: Coasean Approaches to Ending Overfishing: Bigeye Tuna Conservation in the Western and Central Pacific Ocean
27801.zh_title: 结束过度捕捞的科斯式方法：中西太平洋大眼金枪鱼保护
27801.authors: Daniel Ovando, Gary D. Libecap, Katherine D. Millage, Lennon Thomas
27801.abstract: Bigeye tuna in the Western and Central Pacific Ocean were perceived as overfished for nearly 20 years, in large part due to incidental catch in the much larger skipjack tuna fishery. Efforts to halt the overfishing of bigeye stalled due to disagreements over the distribution of costs and benefits from reform. An alternative Coasean-style approach to setting both harvesting levels and the allocation of costs and benefits might offer a path forward. We calculate the costs and benefits of achieving bigeye conservation goals and describe an exchange through which benefits could be realized via removal of Fish Aggregating Devices (FADs). Through trade, aggregate benefits and costs are more apt to be in balance relative to mandated protection controls. The realities of bargaining costs in a multilateral setting are not underappreciated, but in light of existing stalemates in this and other fisheries, consideration of Coasean-style approaches is warranted.
27801.zh_abstract: 中西太平洋的大眼金枪鱼被认为已过度捕捞近20年，很大程度上是由于在规模大得多的鲣鱼渔业中的兼捕。由于对改革成本和收益分配的分歧，阻止大眼金枪鱼过度捕捞的努力陷入停滞。一种替代性的科斯式方法，即同时设定捕捞水平以及成本和收益的分配，可能提供一条前进道路。我们计算了实现大眼金枪鱼保护目标的成本和收益，并描述了一种通过移除集鱼装置（FADs）来实现收益的交换方式。通过交易，总收益和成本更有可能相对于强制保护控制达到平衡。在多边环境中谈判成本的现实性并未被低估，但鉴于该渔业及其他渔业现有的僵局，考虑科斯式方法是合理的。
27801.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, LE, PE；JEL：Q22, Q28, Q57, Q58

27800.title: Communication and the Beliefs of Economic Agents
27800.zh_title: 沟通与经济主体的信念
27800.authors: Bernardo Candia, Olivier Coibion, Yuriy Gorodnichenko
27800.abstract: New surveys provide a wealth of information on how economic agents form their expectations and how those expectations shape their decisions. We review recent evidence on how changes in macroeconomic expectations, particularly inflation expectations, affect households’ and firms’ actions. We show that the provision of information about inflation to households and firms can sometimes backfire in terms of their subsequent decisions. Whether or not this is the case hinges on how individuals interpret the news about inflation: supply-side interpretations (“inflation is bad for the economy”) lead to negative income effects, which can depress economic activity. We show that households in advanced economies, unlike professional forecasters, typically have such a supply-side interpretation, as do many firms. New communication strategies could avoid public misinterpretation of policy decisions.
27800.zh_abstract: 新的调查提供了关于经济主体如何形成预期以及这些预期如何影响其决策的丰富信息。我们回顾了关于宏观经济预期变化（特别是通胀预期）如何影响家庭和企业行为的最新证据。我们表明，向家庭和企业提供通胀信息有时会对其后续决策产生反效果。是否如此取决于个体如何解读通胀新闻：供给侧解读（“通胀对经济不利”）会导致负面的收入效应，从而抑制经济活动。我们表明，发达经济体的家庭（与专业预测者不同）通常持有这种供给侧解读，许多企业也是如此。新的沟通策略可以避免公众对政策决策的误解。
27800.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E2, E3, E4, E5

27846.title: Crimes Against Morality: Unintended Consequences of Criminalizing Sex Work
27846.zh_title: 违反道德罪：将性工作刑事化的意外后果
27846.authors: Lisa Cameron, Jennifer Seager, Manisha Shah
27846.abstract: We examine the impact of criminalizing sex work, exploiting an event in which local officials unexpectedly criminalized sex work in one district in East Java, Indonesia, but not in neighboring districts. We collect data from female sex workers and their clients before and after the change. We find that criminalization increases sexually transmitted infections among female sex workers by 58 percent, measured by biological tests. This is driven by decreased condom access and use. We also find evidence that criminalization decreases earnings among women who left sex work due to criminalization, and decreases their ability to meet their children's school expenses while increasing the likelihood that children begin working to supplement household income. While criminalization has the potential to improve population STI outcomes if the market shrinks permanently, we show that five years post-criminalization the market has rebounded and the probability of STI transmission within the general population is likely to have increased.
27846.zh_abstract: 我们考察了将性工作刑事化的影响，利用印度尼西亚东爪哇省一个地区的地方官员意外将性工作刑事化而邻近地区没有的事件。我们在政策变化前后收集了女性性工作者及其客户的数据。我们发现，刑事化使女性性工作者的性传播感染（通过生物学检测衡量）增加了58%。这是由于安全套获取和使用减少所致。我们还发现证据表明，刑事化降低了因刑事化而离开性工作的女性的收入，降低了她们支付子女教育费用的能力，同时增加了子女开始工作以补充家庭收入的可能性。虽然如果市场永久萎缩，刑事化有可能改善人群的性传播感染结果，但我们表明，在刑事化五年后，市场已经反弹，并且性传播感染在一般人群中传播的可能性可能已经增加。
27846.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EH, LS；JEL：I18, J16, K42

27845.title: Non-Random Exposure to Exogenous Shocks: Theory and Applications
27845.zh_title: 对外生冲击的非随机暴露：理论与应用
27845.abstract: We develop new tools for estimating the causal effects of treatments or instruments that combine multiple sources of variation according to a known formula. Examples include treatments capturing spillovers in social and transportation networks, simulated instruments for policy eligibility, and shift-share instruments. We show how exogenous shocks to some, but not all, determinants of such variables can be leveraged while avoiding omitted variables bias. Our solution involves specifying counterfactual shocks that may as well have been realized and adjusting for a summary measure of non-randomness in shock exposure: the average treatment (or instrument) across such counterfactuals. We further show how to use shock counterfactuals for valid finite-sample inference, and characterize the valid instruments that are asymptotically efficient. We apply this framework to address bias when estimating employment effects of market access growth from Chinese high-speed rail construction, and to boost power when estimating coverage effects of expanded Medicaid eligibility.
27845.zh_abstract: 我们开发了新的工具，用于估计那些根据已知公式组合多个变异来源的处理或工具的因果效应。例子包括捕捉社会和交通网络中溢出效应的处理、政策资格模拟工具以及份额转移工具。我们展示了如何利用此类变量的某些（而非全部）决定因素的外生冲击，同时避免遗漏变量偏差。我们的解决方案涉及指定可能已经实现的反事实冲击，并针对冲击暴露非随机性的一个汇总度量进行调整：这些反事实下的平均处理（或工具）。我们进一步展示了如何使用反事实冲击进行有效的有限样本推断，并刻画了渐近有效的工具。我们将此框架应用于估计中国高铁建设带来的市场准入增长的就业效应时的偏差校正，以及提高扩大医疗补助资格覆盖效应估计的统计功效。
27845.meta: Programs：EH, ITI, LS；JEL：C21, C26, F14, I13, R40

27844.title: Uncertainty, Long-Run, and Monetary Policy Risks in a Two-Country Macro Model
27844.zh_title: 两国宏观模型中的不确定性、长期风险与货币政策风险
27844.authors: Kimberly A. Berg, Nelson C. Mark
27844.abstract: We study international currency risk in a two-country dynamic stochastic general equilibrium model under incomplete markets. The underlying sources of risk are direct shocks to productivity growth, shocks to a long-run risk component of productivity growth, shocks to a stochastic volatility component of productivity growth, and shocks to monetary policy. The long-run risk and stochastic volatility shocks have the interpretation of aggregate demand shocks. Cross-country heterogeneity in the model arises from three sources: differences in the long-run risk and stochastic volatility process parameters that we estimate using United States and Japanese total factor productivity data, differences in monetary policy parameters, and differences in export pricing. The driving force behind currency risk is heterogeneity in precautionary saving. Differences in monetary policy can generate moderate currency risk, but structural differences in productivity growth are more important. Export pricing conventions are not important sources of currency risk. Stochastic volatility shocks are key to generating volatility in the currency risk premium, but they do not help at all in explaining the forward premium bias/anomaly.
27844.zh_abstract: 我们在不完全市场条件下，研究了两国动态随机一般均衡模型中的国际货币风险。风险的潜在来源包括：对生产率增长的直接冲击、对生产率增长长期风险成分的冲击、对生产率增长随机波动成分的冲击，以及对货币政策的冲击。长期风险冲击和随机波动冲击可被解释为总需求冲击。模型中的跨国异质性源于三个方面：我们利用美国和日本的全要素生产率数据估计的长期风险与随机波动过程参数的差异、货币政策参数的差异，以及出口定价的差异。货币风险的驱动力是预防性储蓄的异质性。货币政策差异可以产生适度的货币风险，但生产率增长的结构性差异更为重要。出口定价惯例并非货币风险的重要来源。随机波动冲击对于产生货币风险溢价的波动性至关重要，但它们完全无助于解释远期溢价偏差/异常现象。
27844.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E21, E43, F31, G12

27843.title: Man vs. Machine Learning: The Term Structure of Earnings Expectations and Conditional Biases
27843.zh_title: 人类与机器学习：盈利预期的期限结构与条件性偏差
27843.authors: Jules H. van Binsbergen, Xiao Han, Alejandro Lopez-Lira
27843.abstract: We introduce a real-time measure of conditional biases in firms' earnings forecasts. The measure is defined as the difference between analysts' expectations and a statistically optimal unbiased machine-learning benchmark. Analysts' conditional expectations are, on average, biased upwards, and the bias increases in the forecast horizon. These biases are associated with negative cross-sectional return predictability, and the short legs of many anomalies contain firms with excessively optimistic earnings. Further, managers of companies with the greatest upward-biased earnings forecasts are more likely to issue stocks. Commonly-used linear earnings models do not work out-of-sample and are inferior to those provided by analysts.
27843.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一种实时衡量企业盈利预测条件性偏差的指标。该指标定义为分析师预期与统计上最优的无偏机器学习基准之间的差异。分析师的预期平均而言存在向上偏差，且偏差随预测期限增加而增大。这些偏差与负面的横截面收益可预测性相关，许多异常现象的短端都包含盈利预期过度乐观的公司。此外，盈利预测向上偏差最大的公司管理者更有可能发行股票。常用的线性盈利模型在样本外表现不佳，且劣于分析师提供的模型。
27843.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：D22, D83, D84, G11, G12, G14, G31, G4

27842.title: Choice in Insurance Markets: A Pigouvian Approach to Social Insurance Design
27842.zh_title: 保险市场中的选择：社会保险设计的庇古方法
27842.authors: Nathaniel Hendren, Camille Landais, Johannes Spinnewijn
27842.abstract: Should choice be offered in social insurance programs? The paper presents a conceptual framework that identifies the key forces determining the value of offering choice, reviews some existing evidence on these forces, and aims to guide further empirical research in different in- surance domains. The value of offering choice is higher the larger the variation in individual valuations, but gets reduced by both selection on risk and selection on moral hazard. The imple- mentation of choice-based policies is further challenged by the presence of adverse selection and choice frictions or the obligation to offer basic uncompensated care. These inefficiencies can be seen as externalities, which do not rationalize the absence of providing choice per se, but point to the need for regulatory policies and the potential value of corrective pricing à la Pigou.
27842.zh_abstract: 社会保险项目中是否应提供选择？本文提出了一个概念框架，识别决定提供选择价值的关键力量，回顾了关于这些力量的一些现有证据，并旨在指导不同保险领域的进一步实证研究。提供选择的价值越大，个体估值差异越大，但会因风险选择（逆向选择）和道德风险选择而降低。基于选择的政策的实施还面临逆向选择和选择摩擦的存在，或提供基本无偿护理义务的挑战。这些低效率可被视为外部性，它们本身并不证明不提供选择的合理性，而是指出了监管政策的必要性以及庇古式矫正定价的潜在价值。

27841.title: Pandemics Through the Lens of Occupations
27841.zh_title: 通过职业视角看大流行病
27841.authors: Anand Chopra, Michael B. Devereux, Amartya Lahiri
27841.abstract: We outline a macro-pandemic model where individuals can select into working from home or in the market. Market work increases the risk of infection. Occupations differ in the ease of substitution between market and home work, and in the risk of infection. We examine the evo- lution of a pandemic in the model as well as its macroeconomic and distributional consequences. The model is calibrated to British Columbian data to examine the implications of shutting down different industries by linking industries to occupations. We find that endogenous choice to self- isolate is key: it reduces the peak infection rate by 2 percentage points but reduces the trough consumption level by 4 percentage points, even without policy mandated lockdowns. The model also produces widening consumption inequality, a fact that has characterized COVID-19.
27841.zh_abstract: 我们勾勒了一个宏观大流行病模型，其中个体可以选择在家工作或在市场工作。市场工作会增加感染风险。不同职业在家庭工作与市场工作之间的替代难易程度以及感染风险上存在差异。我们研究了模型中大流行病的演变及其宏观经济和分配后果。该模型根据不列颠哥伦比亚省的数据进行校准，通过将行业与职业联系起来，考察关闭不同行业的影响。我们发现，即使没有政策强制封锁，内生选择自我隔离也是关键：它将感染峰值率降低了2个百分点，但将消费低谷水平降低了4个百分点。该模型还产生了消费不平等加剧的现象，这是COVID-19的一个特征。

27840.title: Globalization and Pandemics
27840.authors: Pol Antràs, Stephen J. Redding, Esteban Rossi-Hansberg
27840.abstract: We propose a theory of the relationship between globalization and pandemics. We start by documenting the importance of international trade for the diffusion of infections in several pandemics throughout history and by showing that trade and travel are closely intertwined. Motivated by this evidence, we build a framework in which business travel facilitates trade according to a constant elasticity gravity equation mediated by mobility frictions. In turn, travel leads to human interactions that transmit disease, as in the Susceptible-Infected-Recovered (SIR) model. We highlight three novel interactions between these two mechanisms. First, trade-motivated travel generates an epidemiological externality across countries. Therefore, reductions in international frictions affect the evolution of the epidemic in each country, and the condition for a pandemic to occur. Second, if infections lead to deaths, or reduce individual labor supply, we establish a general equilibrium social distancing effect, whereby increases in relative prices in unhealthy countries reduce travel to those countries. Third, if agents internalize the threat of infection, we show that their behavioral responses lead to a reduction in travel that is larger for higher-trade-cost locations, and hence leads to an initial fall in the ratio of trade to GDP in the early stages of the epidemic, before a subsequent recovery.
27840.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个关于全球化与大流行病之间关系的理论。我们首先通过历史数据记录了国际贸易在多次大流行病中对于感染扩散的重要性，并表明贸易与旅行紧密相连。受此证据启发，我们构建了一个框架，其中商务旅行根据由流动性摩擦调节的恒定弹性引力方程促进贸易。反过来，旅行导致人际互动，从而传播疾病，如同易感-感染-康复（SIR）模型所述。我们强调了这两种机制之间的三种新颖互动。第一，贸易驱动的旅行产生了跨国流行病学外部性。因此，国际摩擦的减少会影响每个国家流行病的演变以及大流行病发生的条件。第二，如果感染导致死亡或减少个体劳动力供给，我们建立了一个一般均衡的社会距离效应，即不健康国家相对价格的上升会减少前往这些国家的旅行。第三，如果个体内化感染威胁，我们表明他们的行为反应会导致旅行减少，且对于贸易成本较高的地点，减少幅度更大，因此在流行病早期阶段导致贸易与GDP之比最初下降，随后才恢复。
27840.meta: Programs：EFG, EH, IFM, ITI；JEL：F1, F2, F4, F6, I1

27839.title: Measuring Property Rights Institutions
27839.authors: Simeon Djankov, Edward L. Glaeser, Valeria Perotti, Andrei Shleifer
27839.abstract: How do the different elements in the standard bundle of property rights – such as the right of possession or the right of transfer – differentially impact outcomes, such as urban development? This paper incorporates insecure property rights into a standard model of urban land prices and density, and makes predictions about investment in land and property, informality, and the efficiency of land use. Our empirical analysis links data on institutions related to land titling and transfer with multiple urban outcomes, from 190 countries. The evidence is generally consistent with the model’s predictions, and more broadly with the Demsetz’s (1967) approach to property rights institutions. Indeed, we document world-wide improvements in the quality of institutions facilitating property transfer over time.
27839.zh_abstract: 标准产权束中的不同要素——例如占有权或转让权——如何对城市发展等结果产生差异化影响？本文将不安全的产权纳入城市土地价格和密度的标准模型，并对土地和财产投资、非正规性以及土地利用效率做出预测。我们的实证分析将190个国家与土地确权和转让相关的制度数据与多个城市结果联系起来。证据总体上与模型的预测一致，并且更广泛地与德姆塞茨（1967）关于产权制度的方法论相符。事实上，我们记录了全球范围内促进财产转让的制度质量随时间推移而改善。
27839.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：O17, O18, O43, R14, R21

27838.title: Child Skill Production: Accounting for Parental and Market-Based Time and Goods Investments
27838.zh_title: 儿童技能生产：考虑父母与市场的时间及商品投资
27838.authors: Elizabeth M. Caucutt, Lance Lochner, Joseph Mullins, Youngmin Park
27838.abstract: Families invest parental time, home goods/services, and market-based child care in their children. We study these investments, focusing on two issues: the role of parental human capital and the substitutability of inputs in the skill production process. We develop a relative demand estimation strategy that uses intratemporal optimality to estimate input substitutability, as well as the relative productivity of inputs and the role played by parental education. This approach requires only a weak separability assumption on the dynamics of skills, no data on skills, and easily addresses measurement error in inputs. We show how relative demand restrictions can simplify estimation of the dynamics of skill production using (noisy) measures of skills when there are multiple investment inputs that are imperfectly measured. Finally, we show how moments related to relative demand can be combined with moments related to skill dynamics to determine whether beliefs about skill production align with the true technology. Using data from the Child Development Supplement of the PSID, we estimate the skill production technology for children ages 12 and younger, finding moderately strong complementarity between inputs. We estimate little effect of parental education on the child production technology: more-educated parents invest more, because they have higher incomes and stronger preference for children’s skills. Counterfactual simulations show that the degree of input complementarity we estimate has important implications for policies that subsidize specific inputs or provide free child care.
27838.zh_abstract: 家庭在子女身上投入父母时间、家庭商品/服务以及市场化的儿童保育。我们研究这些投资，重点关注两个问题：父母人力资本的作用以及技能生产过程中投入要素的可替代性。我们开发了一种相对需求估计策略，利用期内最优条件来估计投入要素的可替代性，以及投入要素的相对生产率和父母教育所起的作用。该方法仅需要对技能动态做出弱可分性假设，无需技能数据，并且易于解决投入要素的测量误差问题。我们展示了当存在多个测量不完美的投资投入时，相对需求约束如何简化利用（有噪声的）技能指标对技能生产动态的估计。最后，我们展示了如何将相对需求相关的矩与技能动态相关的矩相结合，以确定关于技能生产的信念是否与真实技术一致。利用PSID儿童发展补充调查的数据，我们估计了12岁及以下儿童的技能生产技术，发现投入要素之间存在中等强度的互补性。我们估计父母教育对儿童生产技术影响甚微：受教育程度更高的父母投资更多，是因为他们收入更高且对子女技能有更强的偏好。反事实模拟表明，我们估计的投入互补程度对补贴特定投入或提供免费儿童保育的政策具有重要含义。
27838.meta: Programs：CH, LS；JEL：D13, D15, I24, J13, J22, J24

27837.title: On the Equilibrium Properties of Network Models with Heterogeneous Agents
27837.zh_title: 异质性主体网络模型的均衡性质
27837.authors: Treb Allen, Costas Arkolakis, Xiangliang Li
27837.abstract: We consider a broad class of spatial models where there are many types of interactions across a large number of locations. We provide a new theorem that offers an iterative algorithm for calculating an equilibrium and sufficient and “globally necessary” conditions under which the equilibrium is unique. We show how this theorem enables the characterization of equilibrium properties for two important spatial systems: an urban model with spillovers across a large number of different types of agents and a dynamic migration model with forward looking agents. An Online Appendix provides eleven additional examples of both spatial and non-spatial economic frameworks for which our theorem provides new equilibrium characterizations.
27837.zh_abstract: 我们考虑一大类空间模型，其中在大量地点之间存在多种类型的互动。我们提供了一个新定理，该定理给出了计算均衡的迭代算法，以及均衡唯一的充分且“全局必要”条件。我们展示了该定理如何能够刻画两个重要空间系统的均衡性质：一个包含大量不同类型主体间溢出效应的城市模型，以及一个包含前瞻性主体的动态迁移模型。在线附录提供了另外十一个空间和非空间经济框架的例子，我们的定理为这些框架提供了新的均衡刻画。
27837.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI；JEL：C6, D85, E23, F4, O18, R13

27836.title: Average Inflation Targeting and Household Expectations
27836.zh_title: 平均通胀目标制与家庭预期
27836.authors: Olivier Coibion, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Edward S. Knotek II, Raphael Schoenle
27836.abstract: Using a daily survey of U.S. households, we study how the Federal Reserve’s announcement of its new strategy of average inflation targeting affected households’ expectations. Starting with the day of the announcement, there is a very small uptick in the minority of households reporting that they had heard news about monetary policy relative to prior to the announcement, but this effect fades within a few days. Those hearing news about the announcement do not seem to have understood the announcement: they are no more likely to correctly identify the Fed’s new strategy than others, nor are their expectations different. When we provide randomly selected households with pertinent information about average inflation targeting, their expectations still do not change in a different way than when households are provided with information about traditional inflation targeting. Even one year after the announcement, U.S. households remain mostly unaware of the change in strategy or its implications.
27836.zh_abstract: 利用美国日度家庭调查数据，我们研究了美联储宣布其平均通胀目标制新策略如何影响家庭预期。自宣布之日起，与宣布前相比，报告听到货币政策新闻的家庭比例出现非常微小的上升，但这一效应在几天内消退。听到该宣布新闻的家庭似乎并未理解这一宣布：他们正确识别美联储新策略的可能性并不比其他家庭更高，其预期也没有差异。当我们向随机选择的家庭提供关于平均通胀目标制的相关信息时，他们的预期仍然不会以不同于向家庭提供传统通胀目标制信息的方式发生变化。即使在宣布一年后，美国家庭大多仍不了解这一策略变化或其含义。

27835.title: Inequality of Opportunity for Income in Denmark and the United States: A Comparison Based on Administrative Data
27835.zh_title: 丹麦与美国收入机会不平等：基于行政数据的比较
27835.authors: Pablo Mitnik, Anne-Line Helsø, Victoria L. Bryant
27835.abstract: We carry out a comparative analysis of inequality of opportunity (IOp) for long-run income in Denmark and the United States. We adopt a luck-egalitarian understanding of IOp, use high-quality administrative data, and rely on highly improved methods. These include novel identification assumptions that allow us to produce set estimates of IOp in the United States relative to Denmark rather than just lower-bound estimates of IOp in the two countries. There are five main results. First, with types based only on gender and parental income rank as the circumstances beyond people’s control, measured IOp for income is high in the United States and far from negligible in Denmark: before taxes and transfers, the lower-bound Gini coefficients for individual earnings and family income opportunities are in the 0.21-024 range in the United States and in the 0.08–0.12 range in Denmark. Second, the tax system and the welfare state reduce measured IOp in both countries, but they do so by more than twice as much in Denmark. Third, our analyses in terms of disposable family income per adult—which factor in taxes and transfers and purge the effect of the association between parental income and the probability of marriage—entail that there is more IOp for income in the United States than overall income inequality in Denmark. Fourth, IOp for income is substantially higher in the United States than in Denmark. With opportunities defined in terms of disposable family income per adult, IOp is at the very least 68 percent higher in the United States, and this result is very robust to the inequality index employed in the analysis. Fifth, our lower-bound estimates of the unfair inequality as a share of overall inequality are much larger in both countries than typically reported for advanced economies. When we account for race and ethnicity as circumstances beyond people’s control (in addition to gender and parental income), our lower-bound estimate of that share for the U.S. reaches almost 58 percent. We conclude that the distribution of economic opportunities—and not just of economic outcomes—is substantially less unequal in Denmark than in the U.S., and that a very large share of U.S. income inequality may be tracked back to circumstances beyond people’s control.
27835.zh_abstract: 我们对丹麦和美国长期收入的机会不平等进行了比较分析。我们采用运气平等主义的机会不平等理解，使用高质量的行政数据，并依赖大幅改进的方法。这些方法包括新颖的识别假设，使我们能够产生美国相对于丹麦的机会不平等集合估计，而不仅仅是两国机会不平等的下界估计。主要有五个结果。第一，仅以性别和父母收入排名作为人们无法控制的环境因素，美国收入机会不平等的测量值很高，丹麦也远非可忽略：在税收和转移支付之前，个人收入和家庭收入机会的下界基尼系数在美国为0.21-0.24，在丹麦为0.08-0.12。第二，税收制度和福利国家在两国都降低了测量的机会不平等，但在丹麦的降低幅度是美国的两倍以上。第三，我们以每位成人可支配家庭收入（计入税收和转移支付，并剔除父母收入与婚姻概率关联的影响）进行的分析表明，美国收入机会不平等程度高于丹麦总体收入不平等。第四，美国收入机会不平等显著高于丹麦。以每位成人可支配家庭收入定义机会时，美国机会不平等至少高出68%，且这一结果对分析中使用的基尼系数非常稳健。第五，我们关于不公平不平等占总体不平等份额的下界估计在两国都远大于通常对发达经济体的报告。当我们将种族和民族作为人们无法控制的环境因素（除性别和父母收入外）时，美国该份额的下界估计达到近58%。我们得出结论：丹麦的经济机会分布（而不仅仅是经济结果分布）远不如美国不平等，且美国收入不平等中很大一部分可能追溯到人们无法控制的环境因素。
27835.meta: Programs：PE；JEL：D31, D63, H23, I30, J62, Z13, Z18

27834.title: Marginal Effects of Merit Aid for Low-Income Students
27834.zh_title: 低收入学生助学金边际效应
27834.authors: Joshua Angrist, David Autor, Amanda Pallais
27834.abstract: Financial aid from the Susan Thompson Buffett Foundation (STBF) provides exceptionally generous support to a college population similar to that served by a host of state aid programs. In conjunction with STBF, we randomly assigned aid awards to thousands of Nebraska high school graduates from low-income, minority, and first-generation college households. Randomly- assigned STBF awards boost bachelor's (BA) degree completion for students targeting four-year schools by about 8 points. Degree gains are concentrated among four-year applicants who would otherwise have been unlikely to pursue a four-year program. Degree effects are mediated by award-induced increases in credits earned towards a BA in the first year of college. The extent of initial four-year college engagement explains heterogeneous effects by target campus and across covariate subgroups. Most program spending is a transfer, reducing student debt without affecting degree attainment. Award-induced marginal spending is modest. The projected lifetime earnings impact of awards exceeds marginal educational spending for all of the subgroups examined in the study. Projected earnings gains exceed funder costs for low-income, non-white, urban, and first-generation students, and for students with relatively weak academic preparation.
27834.zh_abstract: 苏珊·汤普森·巴菲特基金会的助学金为与众多州助学金项目服务对象相似的大学生群体提供了异常慷慨的支持。与基金会合作，我们随机向数千名来自低收入、少数族裔和第一代大学生家庭的内布拉斯加州高中毕业生分配助学金。随机分配的助学金使以四年制大学为目标的学生获得学士学位的比例提高了约8个百分点。学位提升集中在那些原本不太可能攻读四年制项目的四年制大学申请者中。学位效应由助学金诱导的大学第一年获得学士学位学分增加所中介。初始四年制大学参与程度解释了按目标校园和协变量子群划分的异质性效应。大部分项目支出是转移支付，减少了学生债务而不影响学位获得。助学金诱导的边际支出适中。对于研究中考察的所有子群，助学金预计的终身收入影响超过了边际教育支出。对于低收入、非白人、城市和第一代大学生以及学业准备相对较弱的学生，预计收入增长超过了资助者成本。

27833.title: The Effects of COVID-19 on U.S. Small Businesses: Evidence from Owners, Managers, and Employees
27833.zh_title: COVID-19对美国小企业的影响：来自所有者、管理者和员工的证据
27833.authors: Georgij Alekseev, Safaa Amer, Manasa Gopal, Theresa Kuchler, JW Schneider, Johannes Stroebel, Nils C. Wernerfelt
27833.abstract: We analyze a large-scale survey of owners, managers, and employees of small businesses in the United States to understand the effects of the early stages of the COVID-19 pandemic on those businesses. The survey was fielded in late April 2020 among Facebook business page administrators, frequent sellers on Facebook's e-commerce platform Marketplace, and the general Facebook user population. We observe more than 66,000 responses covering most sectors of the economy, including many businesses that had stopped operating due to the pandemic. The survey asks 136 questions covering topics such as changes in business operations and employment, changes in financing patterns, and the interaction of household and business responsibilities. We characterize the adjustments implemented to survive the pandemic and explore the key challenges to continue operating or to re-open. We show how these patterns differ across industry, firm size, owner gender, and other firm characteristics.
27833.zh_abstract: 我们分析了一项针对美国小企业所有者、管理者和员工的大规模调查，以了解COVID-19大流行早期阶段对这些企业的影响。该调查于2020年4月下旬在Facebook商业页面管理员、Facebook电子商务平台Marketplace的频繁卖家以及普通Facebook用户群体中进行。我们观察到超过66,000份回复，涵盖了经济的大部分部门，包括许多因大流行而停止运营的企业。调查包含136个问题，涉及业务运营和就业变化、融资模式变化以及家庭与企业责任的互动等主题。我们描述了为在大流行中生存而实施的调整，并探讨了继续运营或重新开业的主要挑战。我们展示了这些模式如何因行业、企业规模、所有者性别和其他企业特征而异。
27833.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IO, LS, ME, PE, PR；JEL：G0, M1

27832.title: Gangs, Labor Mobility and Development
27832.zh_title: 帮派、劳动力流动与发展
27832.authors: Nikita Melnikov, Carlos Schmidt-Padilla, Maria Micaela Sviatschi
27832.abstract: We study how territorial control by criminal organizations affects economic development. We exploit a natural experiment in El Salvador, where the emergence of these criminal organizations was the consequence of an exogenous shift in American immigration policy that led to the deportation of gang leaders from the United States to El Salvador. Upon arrival, the gangs gained control over many urban areas and re-created a system of borders to protect their territory from outsiders. Using a spatial regression discontinuity design, we find that individuals in gang-controlled neighborhoods have less material well-being, income, and education than individuals living only 50 meters away but outside of gang territory. None of these discontinuities existed before the arrival of the gangs. A key mechanism behind the results is that gangs restrict individuals’ mobility, affecting their labor market options by preventing them from commuting to other parts of the city. The results are not determined by high rates of selective migration, differential exposure to extortion and violence, or differences in public goods provision.
27832.zh_abstract: 我们研究犯罪组织对领土的控制如何影响经济发展。我们利用萨尔瓦多的一项自然实验，其中这些犯罪组织的出现是美国移民政策外生转变的结果，该政策导致帮派头目从美国被驱逐到萨尔瓦多。抵达后，帮派控制了许多城市地区，并重建了一套边界系统以保护其领土免受外人侵扰。利用空间断点回归设计，我们发现帮派控制社区的居民在物质福利、收入和教育方面比仅住在50米外但处于帮派领土之外的居民更差。在帮派到来之前，这些断点都不存在。结果背后的一个关键机制是帮派限制了个人的流动性，通过阻止他们通勤到城市其他地区而影响其劳动力市场选择。这些结果并非由高选择性迁移、遭受敲诈和暴力的差异或公共品供给差异所决定。

27831.title: On Public Spending and Economic Unions
27831.zh_title: 论公共支出与经济联盟
27831.authors: Fernando Broner, Alberto Martin, Jaume Ventura
27831.abstract: We analyze the conduct of fiscal policy in a financially integrated union in the presence of financial frictions. Frictions create a wedge between the return to investment and the union interest rate. This leads to an over-spending externality. While the social cost of spending is the return to investment, governments care mostly about the (depressed) interest rate they face. In other words, the crowding out effects of public spending are partly "exported" to the rest of the union. We argue that it may be hard for the union to deal with this externality through the design of fiscal rules, which are bound to be shaped by the preferences of the median country and not by efficiency considerations. We also analyze how this overspending externality -- and the union's ability to deal with it effectively -- changes when the union is financially integrated with the rest of the world. Finally, we extend our model by introducing a zero lower bound on interest rates and show that, if financial frictions are severe enough, the union is pushed into a liquidity trap and the direction of the spending externality is reversed. At such times, fiscal rules that are appropriate during normal times might backfire.
27831.zh_abstract: 我们分析了在存在金融摩擦的情况下，金融一体化联盟中财政政策的实施。摩擦在投资回报与联盟利率之间造成了楔子。这导致了一种过度支出外部性。虽然支出的社会成本是投资回报，但政府主要关心他们面临的（被压低的）利率。换句话说，公共支出的挤出效应部分被“出口”到了联盟其他地区。我们认为，联盟可能难以通过设计财政规则来处理这种外部性，因为这些规则必然受中间国家偏好而非效率考虑的影响。我们还分析了当联盟与世界其他地区金融一体化时，这种过度支出外部性以及联盟有效处理它的能力如何变化。最后，我们通过引入利率零下限扩展了模型，并表明如果金融摩擦足够严重，联盟会被推入流动性陷阱，支出外部性的方向会发生逆转。在这种时候，正常时期合适的财政规则可能会适得其反。
27831.meta: Programs：IFM；JEL：E62, F32, F34, F36, F41, F45

27830.title: The Intergenerational Effects of the Vietnam Draft on Risky Behaviors
27830.zh_title: 越南征兵对风险行为的代际影响
27830.abstract: We exploit the natural experiment provided by the Vietnam lottery draft to evaluate the intergenerational effect of fathers’ draft eligibility on children’s propensity to engage in risky health behaviors during adolescence using the NLSY97. Draft eligibility increases measures of substance use, intensity of use, decreases age of initiation—particularly for marijuana—and increases measures of delinquency. We explore potential mechanisms: Draft eligibility affects paternal parenting styles and attitudes towards the respondent, environmental aspects, and even maternal factors. Results are robust to alternative specifications and falsification diagnostics. Our results indicate that previous analyses underestimate the full negative effects of draft eligibility.
27830.zh_abstract: 我们利用越南抽签征兵提供的自然实验，使用NLSY97数据评估父亲征兵资格对青少年时期子女从事健康风险行为倾向的代际影响。征兵资格增加了物质使用、使用强度的指标，降低了开始年龄——尤其是大麻——并增加了犯罪指标。我们探索了潜在机制：征兵资格影响父亲的教养方式和对受访者的态度、环境方面甚至母亲因素。结果对替代规范和伪造诊断是稳健的。我们的结果表明，以往的分析低估了征兵资格的全面负面影响。

27829.title: Pandemics, Vaccines and an Earnings Damage Function
27829.zh_title: 大流行病、疫苗与盈利损害函数
27829.authors: Harrison Hong, Jeffrey D. Kubik, Neng Wang, Xiao Xu, Jinqiang Yang
27829.abstract: We derive a parsimonious model of damage to corporate earnings from COVID-19. Using measures of expected damage from industry-level earnings forecast revisions, we estimate this model with nonlinear least squares and identifying restrictions related to forecast rationality. Forecasts in mid-May 2020 imply an earnings crash and lower earnings growth until a vaccine arrives in 1.48 years (95% CI [0.61, 5.88]). We extend our framework to account for time-varying vaccine arrival rates. Mid-August 2020 forecasts imply a vaccine arrival in 0.61 years (95% CI [0.35, 1.06]), which is due to positive vaccine news as opposed to fiscal or monetary policy news.
27829.zh_abstract: 我们推导出一个关于COVID-19对企业盈利损害的简约模型。利用行业层面盈利预测修正的预期损害度量，我们通过非线性最小二乘法并施加与预测理性相关的识别约束来估计该模型。2020年5月中旬的预测暗示盈利崩溃，且盈利增长放缓直至疫苗在1.48年（95%置信区间[0.61, 5.88]）内到来。我们将框架扩展以考虑时变的疫苗到达率。2020年8月中旬的预测暗示疫苗在0.61年（95%置信区间[0.35, 1.06]）内到来，这是由于积极的疫苗消息而非财政或货币政策消息。

27828.title: Fencing off Silicon Valley: Cross-Border Venture Capital and Technology Spillovers
27828.zh_title: 围堵硅谷：跨境风险投资与技术溢出
27828.authors: Ufuk Akcigit, Sina T. Ates, Josh Lerner, Richard R. Townsend, Yulia Zhestkova
27828.abstract: The treatment of foreign investors is a contentious topic in U.S. entrepreneurship policy. We model a setting where foreign corporate investments in Silicon Valley may allow U.S. entrepreneurs to pursue technologies that they could not otherwise, but may also lead to knowledge spillovers. We show that despite the benefits from such inbound investments for U.S. firms, it may be optimal for the U.S. government to raise their costs to deter these investments. Using as comprehensive as possible a sample of investments by foreign corporate investors in U.S. startups, we find evidence consistent with the presence of knowledge spillovers to foreign investors.
27828.zh_abstract: 外国投资者的待遇是美国创业政策中一个争议性话题。我们构建了一个模型，其中外国企业对硅谷的公司投资可能使美国创业者得以追求原本无法实现的技术，但也可能导致知识溢出。我们表明，尽管此类入境投资对美国企业有利，但美国政府可能最优选择是提高其成本以阻止这些投资。利用尽可能全面的外国企业投资者对美国初创企业投资的样本，我们发现了与知识溢出至外国投资者相一致的证据。

27827.title: Expanding the Measurement of Culture with a Sample of Two Billion Humans
27827.zh_title: 以二十亿人类样本扩展文化测量
27827.authors: Nick Obradovich, Ömer Özak, Ignacio Martín, Ignacio Ortuño-Ortín, Edmond Awad, Manuel Cebrián, Rubén Cuevas, Klaus Desmet, Iyad Rahwan, Ángel Cuevas
27827.abstract: Culture has played a pivotal role in human evolution. Yet, the ability of social scientists to study culture is limited by the currently available measurement instruments. Scholars of culture must regularly choose between scalable but sparse survey-based methods or restricted but rich ethnographic methods. Here, we demonstrate that massive online social networks can advance the study of human culture by providing quantitative, scalable, and high-resolution measurement of behaviorally revealed cultural values and preferences. We employ publicly available data across nearly 60,000 topic dimensions drawn from two billion Facebook users across 225 countries and territories. We first validate that cultural distances calculated from this measurement instrument correspond to traditional survey-based and objective measures of cross-national cultural differences. We then demonstrate that this expanded measure enables rich insight into the cultural landscape globally at previously impossible resolution. We analyze the importance of national borders in shaping culture, explore unique cultural markers that identify subnational population groups, and compare subnational divisiveness to gender divisiveness across countries. The global collection of massive data on human behavior provides a high-dimensional complement to traditional cultural metrics. Further, the granularity of the measure presents enormous promise to advance scholars' understanding of additional fundamental questions in the social sciences. The measure enables detailed investigation into the geopolitical stability of countries, social cleavages within both small and large-scale human groups, the integration of migrant populations, and the disaffection of certain population groups from the political process, among myriad other potential future applications.
27827.zh_abstract: 文化在人类进化中发挥了关键作用。然而，社会科学家研究文化的能力受到现有测量工具的限制。文化学者通常必须在可扩展但稀疏的基于调查的方法与受限但丰富的民族志方法之间做出选择。在此，我们证明大规模在线社交网络可以通过提供对行为揭示的文化价值观和偏好的定量、可扩展且高分辨率的测量，推动人类文化研究。我们利用来自225个国家和地区20亿Facebook用户的近60,000个主题维度的公开数据。我们首先验证了从该测量工具计算出的文化距离与传统的基于调查和客观的跨国文化差异测量指标相对应。然后，我们证明这种扩展的测量能够以前所未有的分辨率深入洞察全球文化格局。我们分析了国家边界在塑造文化中的重要性，探索了识别次国家级人口群体的独特文化标记，并比较了各国次国家级分歧与性别分歧。全球范围内大规模人类行为数据的收集为传统文化指标提供了高维补充。此外，该测量的粒度为进一步推进学者理解社会科学中其他基本问题带来了巨大希望。该测量能够详细研究国家的地缘政治稳定性、小规模和大规模人类群体内部的社会裂痕、移民人口的融合，以及某些人口群体对政治进程的疏离感，以及其他众多潜在的未来应用。
27827.meta: Programs：POL, TWP；JEL：C80, J10, J16, O10, R10, Z10

27826.title: Optimal Financial Transaction Taxes
27826.abstract: This paper characterizes the optimal transaction tax in an equilibrium model of competitive financial markets. As long as investors hold heterogeneous beliefs that are not related to their fundamental trading motives and the planner calculates welfare using any single belief, a strictly positive tax is optimal, regardless of the magnitude of fundamental trading. Under some conditions, the optimal tax is independent of the belief used by the planner to calculate welfare. The optimal tax can be implemented by adjusting its value until observed total volume equals fundamental volume. Knowledge of i) the share of non-fundamental trading volume and ii) the semi-elasticity of trading volume to tax changes is sufficient to quantify the optimal tax. A calibration of the model consistent with empirically estimated volume semi-elasticities to tax changes and that features a 30% share of non-fundamental trading volume is associated with a 37bps optimal tax.
27826.zh_abstract: 本文在竞争性金融市场的均衡模型中刻画了最优交易税。只要投资者持有与其基本交易动机无关的异质信念，并且计划者使用任何单一信念计算福利，那么无论基本交易规模如何，严格为正的税收都是最优的。在某些条件下，最优税收独立于计划者用于计算福利的信念。最优税收可以通过调整其值直到观察到的总交易量等于基本交易量来实施。了解(i)非基本交易量的份额和(ii)交易量对税收变化的半弹性足以量化最优税收。一个与经验估计的交易量半弹性一致且具有30%非基本交易量份额的模型校准，对应37个基点的最优税收。
27826.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, PE；JEL：D61, G18, H21

27825.title: Dissertators with Distantly Related Foci Face Divergent Near-Term Outcomes
27825.zh_title: 研究焦点相距甚远的博士毕业生面临分化的短期结果
27825.authors: Kevin M. Kniffin, Andrew S. Hanks, Xuechao Qian, Bo Wang, Bruce A. Weinberg
27825.abstract: Institutional leaders have long championed interdisciplinary research; however, researchers have paid relatively little attention to the people responding to such calls and their subsequent career outcomes. With the benefit of two large datasets spanning from 1986 through 2016, we show that interdisciplinary dissertations have become consistently more common in recent years as institutional leaders have highlighted the value of boundary-spanning research for solving important and emergent problems. With the benefit of survey data from a near-complete population of all dissertators in the US starting in 2001 through 2016, we observe a consistent upward trend in interdisciplinary dissertations. Unfortunately, we show that these interdisciplinary dissertators have experienced a comparably persistent penalty when considering salaries for their first year after earning the PhD. We also show that among interdisciplinary dissertators, individuals in lower-paying fields tend to earn more when choosing distantly related topic-combinations whereas researchers in higher-paying fields tend to be most rewarded for staying within relatively narrow disciplinary silos.
27825.zh_abstract: 机构领导者长期以来一直倡导跨学科研究；然而，研究人员对响应此类号召的人及其后续职业成果关注相对较少。借助1986年至2016年的两个大型数据集，我们表明，近年来随着机构领导者强调跨界研究对于解决重要和新兴问题的价值，跨学科博士论文变得越来越普遍。利用2001年至2016年美国几乎所有博士毕业生的调查数据，我们观察到跨学科博士论文的持续上升趋势。不幸的是，我们发现这些跨学科博士毕业生在获得博士学位后的第一年薪资方面经历了持续性的惩罚。我们还表明，在跨学科博士毕业生中，低薪领域的个体在选择相距较远的主题组合时往往收入更高，而高薪领域的研究人员则倾向于在相对狭窄的学科范围内获得最大回报。

27824.title: Venture Capitalists and COVID-19
27824.authors: Paul Gompers, Will Gornall, Steven N. Kaplan, Ilya A. Strebulaev
27824.abstract: We survey over 1,000 institutional and corporate venture capitalists (VCs) at more than 900 different firms to learn how their decisions and investments have been affected by the COVID-19 pandemic. We compare their survey answers to those provided by a large sample of VCs in early 2016 and analyzed in Gompers, Gornall, Kaplan, and Strebulaev (2020). VCs have slowed their investment pace (71% of normal) and expect to invest at 81% of their normal pace over the coming year. Not surprisingly, they have devoted more time to guiding the portfolio companies through the pandemic. VCs report that 52% of their portfolio companies are positively affected or unaffected by the pandemic; 38% are negatively affected; and 10% are severely negatively affected. Overall, they expect the pandemic to have a small negative effect on their fund IRRs (-1.6%) and MOICs (-0.07). Surprisingly, we find little change in the allocation of their time to helping portfolio companies relative to looking for new investments. In general, we find only modest differences between institutional and corporate VCs.
27824.zh_abstract: 我们调查了来自900多家不同公司的1000多名机构和企业风险投资家，以了解他们的决策和投资如何受到COVID-19大流行的影响。我们将他们的调查答案与2016年初由Gompers、Gornall、Kaplan和Strebulaev（2020）分析的大量风险投资家样本提供的答案进行了比较。风险投资家已经放慢了投资步伐（为正常的71%），并预计在未来一年以正常速度的81%进行投资。毫不奇怪，他们投入了更多时间来指导投资组合公司度过大流行。风险投资家报告称，其投资组合公司中有52%受到大流行的正面影响或未受影响；38%受到负面影响；10%受到严重负面影响。总体而言，他们预计大流行将对其基金内部收益率（-1.6%）和投资回报倍数（-0.07）产生较小的负面影响。令人惊讶的是，我们发现他们在帮助投资组合公司与寻找新投资之间的时间分配几乎没有变化。总体而言，我们发现机构和企业风险投资家之间只有适度的差异。

27823.title: Intergenerational Mobility in Socio-emotional Skills
27823.zh_title: 社会情感技能的代际流动性
27823.authors: Orazio Attanasio, Áureo de Paula, Alessandro Toppeta
27823.abstract: This paper investigates the intergenerational transmission of socio-emotional skills during childhood, using data from the 1970 British Cohort Study (BCS70) in the United Kingdom. This dataset enables us to measure two dimensions of socio-emotional development: internalising and externalising skills. More importantly, we can use multiple measures of parents’ skills collected during both their childhood and their adulthood. Whereas parent-child skills are strongly related when both are measured contemporaneously, they remain correlated when both are measured in childhood, with a stronger transmission observed from mothers to their children. Additionally, by leveraging the BCS70 data on socio-emotional skills for three generations, we estimate multi-generational persistence. Notably, we find a correlation between the grandmother’s internalising skill and the grandchildren’s skills, even after accounting for parental skills.
27823.zh_abstract: 本文利用英国1970年英国队列研究的数据，调查了儿童时期社会情感技能的代际传递。该数据集使我们能够测量社会情感发展的两个维度：内化技能和外化技能。更重要的是，我们可以利用在父母童年和成年时期收集的多种父母技能测量指标。虽然父母与子女的技能在同时测量时密切相关，但当两者都在童年时期测量时，它们仍然相关，并且观察到从母亲到子女的传递更强。此外，通过利用BCS70关于三代人社会情感技能的数据，我们估计了多代持续性。值得注意的是，我们发现祖母的内化技能与孙辈的技能之间存在相关性，即使在考虑了父母技能之后也是如此。
27823.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS；JEL：D63, I21, J24, J62

27877.title: SME Failures Under Large Liquidity Shocks: An Application to the COVID-19 Crisis
27877.zh_title: 大型流动性冲击下的中小企业倒闭：以新冠疫情危机为例
27877.authors: Pierre-Olivier Gourinchas, Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan, Veronika Penciakova, Nick Sander
27877.abstract: We study the effects of financial frictions on firm exit when firms face large liquidity shocks. We develop a simple model of firm cost-minimization, where firms’ borrowing capacity to smooth temporary shocks to liquidity is limited. In this framework, firm exit arises from the interaction between this financial friction and fluctuations in cash flow due to aggregate and sectoral changes in demand conditions, as well as more traditional shocks to productivity. To evaluate the implications of our model, we use firm level data on small and medium sized enterprises (SMEs) in 11 European countries. We confirm that our framework is consistent with official failure rates in 2017-2019, a period characterized by standard business cycle fluctuations in demand. To capture a large liquidity shock, we apply our framework to the COVID-19 crisis. We find that, absent government support, SME failure rates would have increased by 6.01 percentage points, putting 3.1 percent of employment at risk. Our results also show that in the presence of financial frictions and in the absence of government support, the firms failing due to COVID have similar productivity and growth to firms that survive COVID.
27877.zh_abstract: 我们研究了当企业面临大规模流动性冲击时，金融摩擦对企业退出的影响。我们构建了一个简单的企业成本最小化模型，在该模型中，企业为平滑暂时性流动性冲击而进行借贷的能力是有限的。在此框架下，企业退出源于这种金融摩擦与因总体和行业需求状况变化以及更传统的生产率冲击所导致的现金流波动之间的相互作用。为了评估我们模型的含义，我们使用了11个欧洲国家中小企业的企业层面数据。我们确认，我们的框架与2017-2019年（一个以标准商业周期需求波动为特征的时期）的官方倒闭率是一致的。为了捕捉一次大规模的流动性冲击，我们将我们的框架应用于新冠疫情危机。我们发现，如果没有政府支持，中小企业的倒闭率将上升6.01个百分点，使3.1%的就业面临风险。我们的结果还表明，在存在金融摩擦且缺乏政府支持的情况下，因新冠疫情而倒闭的企业与幸存下来的企业具有相似的生产率和增长水平。

27876.title: Modeling the Consumption Response to the CARES Act
27876.zh_title: 模拟对《CARES法案》的消费反应
27876.authors: Christopher D. Carroll, Edmund Crawley, Jiri Slacalek, Matthew N. White
