27876.abstract: To predict the effects of the 2020 U.S. CARES Act on consumption, we extend a model that matches responses to past consumption stimulus packages. The extension allows us to account for two novel features of the coronavirus crisis. First, during lockdowns, many types of spending are undesirable or impossible. Second, some of the jobs that disappear during the lockdown will not reappear. We estimate that, if the lockdown is short-lived (the median point of view as we are writing in April 2020), the combination of expanded unemployment insurance benefits and stimulus payments should be sufficient to allow a swift recovery in consumer spending to pre-crisis levels. If the lockdown lasts longer (or there is a ‘second wave’), an extension of enhanced unemployment benefits will likely be necessary for consumption spending to recover quickly.
27876.zh_abstract: 为了预测2020年美国《CARES法案》对消费的影响，我们扩展了一个能够匹配过去消费刺激计划反应的模型。这一扩展使我们能够考虑新冠疫情危机的两个新特征。首先，在封锁期间，许多类型的消费是不被期望或不可能的。其次，封锁期间消失的部分工作岗位将不会重新出现。我们估计，如果封锁是短暂的（截至2020年4月撰写本文时的中位数观点），扩大的失业保险福利和刺激性支付的组合应该足以使消费者支出迅速恢复到危机前的水平。如果封锁持续时间更长（或者出现“第二波”），那么为了消费支出能够快速复苏，延长增强型失业救济金可能是必要的。
27876.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：D14, D83, D84, E21, E32

27875.title: Nudging Timely Wage Reporting: Field Experimental Evidence from the United States Social Supplementary Income Program
27875.zh_title: 助推及时工资报告：来自美国社会补充收入计划的实地实验证据
27875.authors: C. Yiwei Zhang, Jeffrey Hemmeter, Judd B. Kessler, Robert D. Metcalfe, Robert Weathers
27875.abstract: We study a large-scale (n=50,000) natural field experiment implemented by the U.S. Social Security Administration that was aimed at increasing the timely and accurate self-reporting of wages by Supplemental Security Income (SSI) recipients. Sending a letter reminding SSI recipients of their wage reporting responsibilities significantly increased both the likelihood of reporting any earnings and the total amount of earnings reported, though this effect decays slightly over time. However, the specific letter content—providing social information or highlighting the salience of penalties—had no systematic effect. We develop a conservative estimate that the letters generated roughly $\$5.91$ in savings on average per dollar spent for the U.S. government.
27875.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一项由美国社会保障局实施的大规模（n=50,000）自然实地实验，该实验旨在提高补充保障收入领取者及时准确地自我报告工资的水平。向补充保障收入领取者发送一封提醒其工资报告责任的信件，显著增加了报告任何收入的可能性以及报告的收入总额，尽管这种效应会随时间略有衰减。然而，具体的信件内容——提供社会信息或强调惩罚的显著性——没有产生系统性影响。我们得出一个保守估计，即这些信件平均每花费1美元，为美国政府节省了大约5.91美元。

27873.title: The International Propagation of Economic Downturns Through Multinational Companies: The Real Economy Channel
27873.zh_title: 经济衰退通过跨国公司的国际传导：实体经济渠道
27873.authors: Jan Bena, Serdar Dinc, Isil Erel
27873.abstract: We study how non-financial multinational companies propagate economic declines from their subsidiaries located in countries experiencing an economic downturn to subsidiaries in countries not experiencing one. We find that investment is 18% lower in subsidiaries of these parents relative to the same-industry, same-country subsidiaries of parents that are headquartered in the same parent country but do not have a subsidiary in a country experiencing an economic downturn. The employment growth rate in the affected subsidiaries is zero or negative while it is 1.4% in the subsidiaries of unaffected parents. The aggregate industry-level sales and employment are also negatively impacted in the countries of the affected subsidiaries.
27873.zh_abstract: 我们研究了非金融跨国公司如何将经济衰退从其位于经历经济衰退国家的子公司传导至位于未经历经济衰退国家的子公司。我们发现，与那些总部位于同一母公司国家、但在经历经济衰退国家没有子公司、且处于相同行业和相同国家的母公司子公司相比，这些母公司子公司的投资要低18%。受影响子公司的就业增长率为零或负值，而未受影响母公司子公司的就业增长率为1.4%。在受影响子公司所在国家，总体行业层面的销售额和就业也受到负面影响。

27872.title: A Theory of Foreign Exchange Interventions
27872.abstract: We study a real small open economy with two key ingredients: (i) partial segmentation of home and foreign bond markets and (ii) a pecuniary externality that makes the real exchange rate excessively volatile in response to capital flows. Partial segmentation implies that, by intervening in the bond markets, the central bank can affect the exchange rate and the spread between home- and foreign-bond yields. Such interventions allow the central bank to address the pecuniary externality, but they are also costly, as foreigners make carry-trade profits. We analytically characterize the optimal intervention policy that solves this trade-off: (a) the optimal policy leans against the wind, stabilizing the exchange rate; (b) it involves smooth spreads but allows exchange rates to jump; (c) it partly relies on “forward guidance”, with non-zero interventions even after the shock has subsided; (d) it requires credibility, in that central banks do not intervene without commitment. Finally, we shed light on the global consequences of widespread interventions, using a multi-country extension of our model. We find that, left to themselves, countries over-accumulate reserves, reducing welfare and leading to inefficiently low world interest rates.
27872.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个具有两个关键特征的真实小型开放经济体：（i）国内和国外债券市场的部分分割，以及（ii）一种货币外部性，使得实际汇率对资本流动的反应过度波动。部分分割意味着，通过干预债券市场，中央银行可以影响汇率以及国内和国外债券收益率之间的利差。这种干预使中央银行能够解决货币外部性，但也是有代价的，因为外国投资者会进行套利交易获利。我们分析性地刻画了解决这一权衡的最优干预政策：（a）最优政策是逆风而行，稳定汇率；（b）它涉及平滑的利差，但允许汇率跳跃；（c）它部分依赖于“前瞻性指引”，即使在冲击消退后仍进行非零干预；（d）它需要可信度，即没有承诺的中央银行不会进行干预。最后，我们利用模型的多国扩展，揭示了广泛干预的全球后果。我们发现，如果放任自流，各国会过度积累储备，降低福利并导致世界利率低效地偏低。

27871.title: Impediments to the Schumpeterian Process in the Replacement of Large Firms
27871.zh_title: 大型企业更替中熊彼特过程的障碍
27871.abstract: Using newly-assembled data encompassing up to 75 countries and starting circa 1910, we find that the Schumpeterian process of creative destruction aptly describes the replacement of large firms by other firms, but exceptions to the norm of replacement are not rare and replacement is often not by new firms. Initial firm size and political connections represent the main obstacles to the Schumpeterian process while board interlocks and a corporate culture of innovation play modest roles. Consistent with a theory of political capture, when accompanied by regulations that restrict entry, political connections play a formidable role in abetting large firms remaining large.
27871.zh_abstract: 利用新汇编的、涵盖多达75个国家且起始于1910年左右的数据，我们发现熊彼特的创造性破坏过程恰当地描述了大型企业被其他企业所取代的现象，但不符合更替常态的例外情况并不罕见，而且更替往往不是由新企业完成的。初始企业规模和政治关联是熊彼特过程的主要障碍，而董事会连锁和企业创新文化的作用则较为温和。与政治俘获理论一致，当伴随着限制进入的监管时，政治关联在助长大型企业保持其规模方面发挥着巨大作用。
27871.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, POL；JEL：G3, G38, O16, P16

27870.title: Long-run Returns to Private Equity in Emerging Markets
27870.zh_title: 新兴市场私募股权的长期回报
27870.authors: Shawn Cole, Martin Melecky, Florian Mölders, Tristan Reed
27870.abstract: We provide the first evidence on the long-run returns to private equity in emerging and frontier markets using the cash flows from every equity investment made by the International Finance Corporation across 130 countries over 58 years. Risk-adjusted returns are comparable to the S&P 500, at least from 1961 until 2010. Returns improve with economic growth, but decline as banking systems deepen and countries relax capital controls. These results are consistent with the thesis that financial frictions have prevented the flow of capital from rich to poor countries, and that the persistence of impact investors’ performance may rely on identifying or creating new markets that lack access to capital.
27870.zh_abstract: 我们利用国际金融公司在130个国家58年间每笔股权投资产生的现金流，首次提供了新兴市场和前沿市场私募股权长期回报的证据。至少从1961年到2010年，风险调整后的回报与标普500指数相当。回报随着经济增长而改善，但随着银行体系深化和各国放松资本管制而下降。这些结果与以下论点一致：金融摩擦阻碍了资本从富国流向穷国，并且影响力投资者的持续表现可能依赖于识别或创造缺乏资本准入的新市场。

27869.title: Is the Selfish Life-Cycle Model More Applicable in Japan and, If So, Why? A Literature Survey
27869.zh_title: 自私的生命周期模型在日本是否更适用？如果是，为什么？一项文献综述
27869.abstract: The selfish life-cycle model or hypothesis is, together with the dynasty or altruism model, the most widely used theoretical model of household behavior in economics, but does this model apply in the case of a country like Japan, which is said to have closer family ties than other countries? In this paper, we first provide a brief exposition of the simplest version of the selfish life-cycle model and then survey the literature on household saving and bequest behavior in Japan in order to answer this question. The paper finds that almost all of the available evidence suggests that the selfish life-cycle model applies to at least some extent in all countries but that there is more consistent support for this model in Japan than in the United States and other countries. It then explores possible explanations for why the life-cycle model is more consistently supported in Japan than in other countries, attributing this finding to government policies, institutional factors, economic factors, demographic factors, and cultural factors. Finally, it shows that the findings of the paper have many important implications for economic modeling and for government tax and expenditure policies.
27869.zh_abstract: 自私的生命周期模型或假说，与王朝模型或利他主义模型一起，是经济学中最常用的家庭行为理论模型，但这个模型是否适用于像日本这样据说家庭纽带比其他国更紧密的国家？在本文中，我们首先简要阐述了最简单的自私生命周期模型版本，然后为了回答这个问题，我们调查了关于日本家庭储蓄和遗赠行为的文献。本文发现，几乎所有可获得的证据都表明，自私的生命周期模型至少在一定程度上适用于所有国家，但该模型在日本得到的支持比在美国和其他国家更为一致。然后，本文探讨了生命周期模型在日本比在其他国家得到更一致支持的可能解释，将此发现归因于政府政策、制度因素、经济因素、人口因素和文化因素。最后，本文表明，该研究的发现对经济建模以及政府税收和支出政策具有许多重要启示。
27869.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, PE；JEL：D11, D12, D14, D15, D64, E21, J14

27868.title: Health Insurance Menu Design for Large Employers
27868.zh_title: 大型雇主的健康保险菜单设计
27868.abstract: We provide a framework for large employers designing a menu of health plan offerings that differ on both financial and non-financial dimensions. Using detailed administrative data from Harvard University, we estimate a model of plan choice and utilization, and evaluate the benefits of cost sharing and plan variety. For this population of employed consumers, and a single plan with a generous out-of-pocket maximum and zero deductible, we find that modest cost sharing of approximately 30% maximizes average employee surplus. Further gains from offering choice are limited if based solely on financial characteristics, but can be meaningful if paired with differentiation along other dimensions where consumer preferences are correlated with efficient coverage levels.
27868.zh_abstract: 我们为大型雇主设计一个在财务和非财务维度上均有差异的健康保险计划菜单提供了分析框架。利用哈佛大学的详细行政数据，我们估计了一个计划选择与利用模型，并评估了成本分摊和计划多样性的收益。对于这一就业消费者群体，以及一个设有慷慨自付上限和零免赔额的单一计划，我们发现大约30%的适度成本分摊能最大化平均员工剩余。如果仅基于财务特征提供选择，其额外收益有限；但如果与消费者偏好与有效保障水平相关的其他维度差异化相结合，则可能具有实际意义。

27867.title: Firm-Level Risk Exposures and Stock Returns in the Wake of COVID-19
27867.zh_title: COVID-19冲击下的企业层面风险暴露与股票回报
27867.authors: Steven J. Davis, Stephen Hansen, Cristhian Seminario-Amez
27867.abstract: Firm-level stock returns differ enormously in reaction to COVID-19 news. We characterize these reactions using the Risk Factors discussions in pre-pandemic 10-K filings and two text-analytic approaches: expert-curated dictionaries and supervised machine learning (ML). Bad COVID-19 news lowers returns for firms with high exposures to travel, traditional retail, aircraft production and energy supply—directly and via downstream demand linkages—and raises them for firms with high exposures to healthcare policy, e-commerce, web services, drug trials and materials that feed into supply chains for semiconductors, cloud computing and telecommunications. Monetary and fiscal policy responses to the pandemic strongly impact firm-level returns as well, but differently than pandemic news. Despite methodological differences, dictionary and ML approaches yield remarkably congruent return predictions. Importantly though, ML operates on a vastly larger feature space, yielding richer characterizations of risk exposures and outperforming the dictionary approach in goodness-of-fit. By integrating elements of both approaches, we uncover new risk factors and sharpen our explanations for firm-level returns. To illustrate the broader utility of our methods, we also apply them to explain firm-level returns in reaction to the March 2020 Super Tuesday election results.
27867.zh_abstract: 企业层面的股票回报对COVID-19新闻的反应差异巨大。我们利用疫情前10-K文件中的风险因素讨论以及两种文本分析方法——专家策划词典和监督机器学习——来刻画这些反应。负面COVID-19新闻降低了那些对旅游、传统零售、飞机生产和能源供应（直接及通过下游需求关联）有高暴露企业的回报，同时提高了那些对医疗政策、电子商务、网络服务、药物试验以及半导体、云计算和电信供应链中投入材料有高暴露企业的回报。应对疫情的货币和财政政策也强烈影响企业层面回报，但其影响方式与疫情新闻不同。尽管方法存在差异，词典和机器学习方法得出了显著一致的回报预测。然而，重要的是，机器学习在远为庞大的特征空间上运行，提供了更丰富的风险暴露刻画，并在拟合优度上优于词典方法。通过整合两种方法的要素，我们发现了新的风险因素，并增强了对企业层面回报的解释。为说明我们方法的更广泛实用性，我们还将其应用于解释2020年3月超级星期二选举结果引发的企业层面回报。

27866.title: The Wisdom of the Robinhood Crowd
27866.abstract: Robinhood (RH) investors collectively increased their holdings in the March 2020 COVID bear market, indicating an absence of panic and margin calls. Their steadfastness was rewarded in the subsequent bull market. Despite unusual interest in some “experience” stocks, their aggregated consensus portfolio (likely mimicking the household-equal-weighted portfolio) primarily tilted towards stocks with high past share volume and dollar-trading volume. These were mostly big stocks. Both their timing and their consensus portfolio performed well from mid-2018 to mid-2020.
27866.zh_abstract: Robinhood投资者在2020年3月的COVID熊市中集体增加了持仓，表明没有出现恐慌和追加保证金的情况。他们的坚定在随后的牛市中获得了回报。尽管对一些“体验”股票表现出异常兴趣，他们汇总的共识投资组合（可能模仿家庭等权重投资组合）主要偏向于过去高成交量和美元交易量的股票，这些大多是大型股票。从2018年中到2020年中，他们的择时和共识投资组合表现良好。

27865.title: COVID-19 Changed Tastes for Safety-Net Programs
27865.zh_title: COVID-19改变了人们对安全网项目的偏好
27865.authors: Alex Rees-Jones, John D'Attoma, Amedeo Piolatto, Luca Salvadori
27865.abstract: In June 2020, we surveyed 2,516 Americans regarding their preferences for both short- and long-term expansions to government-provided healthcare and unemployment insurance programs. We find that support for such programs is positively associated with (a) COVID-19 deaths and infections in the respondent’s county, (b) the pandemic-induced change in the unemployment rate in the respondent’s county, and (c) survey elicitations of the respondent’s perceptions of COVID-19’s consequences. These associations persist when controlling for pre-COVID-19 political ideology and demographics. These results suggest that real or perceived exposure to COVID-19’s consequences has influenced support for expansions to the U.S. safety-net system.
27865.zh_abstract: 2020年6月，我们对2516名美国人进行了调查，了解他们对政府提供的医疗和失业保险项目短期和长期扩张的偏好。我们发现，对这些项目的支持与以下因素正相关：（a）受访者所在县的COVID-19死亡和感染人数，（b）疫情导致的受访者所在县失业率变化，以及（c）调查中受访者对COVID-19后果的感知。这些关联在控制疫情前的政治意识形态和人口统计特征后仍然存在。这些结果表明，对COVID-19后果的真实或感知暴露影响了人们对美国安全网系统扩张的支持。

27864.title: Cross-Sectional Uncertainty and the Business Cycle: Evidence from 40 Years of Options Data
27864.zh_title: 横截面不确定性与经济周期：来自40年期权数据的证据
27864.abstract: This paper presents a novel and unique measure of cross-sectional uncertainty constructed from stock options on individual firms. Cross-sectional uncertainty varied little between 1980 and 1995, and subsequently had three distinct peaks -- during the tech boom, the financial crisis, and the coronavirus epidemic. Cross-sectional uncertainty has had a mixed relationship with overall economic activity, and aggregate uncertainty is much more powerful for forecasting aggregate growth. The data and moments can be used to calibrate and test structural models of the effects of uncertainty shocks. In international data, we find similar dynamics and a strong common factor in cross-sectional uncertainty. The data is available on our websites. A companion paper [Dew-Becker and Giglio, "Real-time forward-looking skewness over the business cycle"] finds firm-level skewness is significantly procyclical.
27864.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种新颖且独特的横截面不确定性度量，该度量基于个股的股票期权构建。横截面不确定性在1980年至1995年间变化不大，随后出现了三个明显的峰值——在科技繁荣、金融危机和冠状病毒疫情期间。横截面不确定性与整体经济活动的关系复杂，而总体不确定性在预测总体增长方面更为有力。这些数据和矩可用于校准和检验不确定性冲击效应的结构模型。在国际数据中，我们发现了类似的动态特征以及横截面不确定性中一个强大的共同因子。数据可在我们的网站上获取。一篇配套论文[Dew-Becker and Giglio, "Real-time forward-looking skewness over the business cycle"]发现企业层面的偏度具有显著的顺周期性。
27864.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：C58, D81, D84, E22, E30, E32, E37, G13

27863.title: A Calculation of the Social Returns to Innovation
27863.authors: Benjamin F. Jones, Lawrence H. Summers
27863.abstract: This paper estimates the social returns to investments in innovation. The disparate spillovers associated with innovation, including imitation, business stealing, and intertemporal spillovers, have made calculations of the social returns difficult. Here we provide an economy-wide calculation that nets out the many spillover margins. We further assess the role of capital investment, diffusion delays, learning-by-doing, productivity mismeasurement, health outcomes, and international spillovers in assessing the average social returns. Overall, our estimates suggest that the social returns are very large. Even under conservative assumptions, innovation efforts produce social benefits that are many multiples of the investment costs.
27863.zh_abstract: 本文估算了创新投资的社会回报。与创新相关的各种溢出效应，包括模仿、商业窃取和跨期溢出，使得社会回报的计算变得困难。在此，我们提供了一种全经济范围的核算方法，剔除了众多溢出渠道。我们进一步评估了资本投资、扩散延迟、干中学、生产率测量误差、健康结果和国际溢出在评估平均社会回报中的作用。总体而言，我们的估计表明社会回报非常大。即使在保守假设下，创新努力产生的社会收益也是投资成本的数倍。

27862.title: Tapping into Talent: Coupling Education and Innovation Policies for Economic Growth
27862.zh_title: 挖掘人才：耦合教育与创新政策促进经济增长
27862.authors: Ufuk Akcigit, Jeremy G. Pearce, Marta Prato
27862.abstract: How do innovation and education policy affect individual career choice and aggregate productivity? This paper analyzes the various layers that connect R&D subsidies and higher education policy to productivity growth. We put the development of scarce talent and career choice at the center of a new endogenous growth framework with individual-level heterogeneity in talent, frictions, and preferences. We link the model to micro-level data from Denmark and uncover a host of facts about the links between talent, higher education, and innovation. We use these facts to calibrate the model and study counterfactual policy exercises. We find that R&D subsidies, while less effective than standard models, can be strengthened when combined with higher education policy that alleviates financial frictions for talented youth. Education and innovation policies not only alleviate different frictions, but also impact innovation at different time horizons. Education policy is also more effective in societies with high income inequality.
27862.zh_abstract: 创新和教育政策如何影响个人职业选择和总体生产率？本文分析了连接研发补贴和高等教育政策与生产率增长的各个层面。我们将稀缺人才的培养和职业选择置于一个新的内生增长框架中心，该框架包含个体层面的人才异质性、摩擦和偏好。我们将模型与丹麦的微观数据联系起来，揭示了关于人才、高等教育和创新之间联系的一系列事实。我们利用这些事实校准模型并研究反事实政策实验。我们发现，研发补贴虽然不如标准模型有效，但当与缓解有才华青年财务摩擦的高等教育政策相结合时，其效果可以得到加强。教育和创新政策不仅缓解不同的摩擦，而且在不同时间范围内影响创新。在收入不平等程度较高的社会中，教育政策也更为有效。

27861.title: Does Fiscal Policy Matter for Stock-Bond Return Correlation?
27861.zh_title: 财政政策对股债收益相关性重要吗？
27861.authors: Erica X.N. Li, Tao Zha, Ji Zhang, Hao Zhou
27861.abstract: We explore an important role of monetary-fiscal policy interactions in explaining three stylized facts: (1) a positive correlation of stock and bond returns in 1971-2001 and a negative one after 2001, (2) a negative correlation of consumption and inflation in 1971-2001 and a positive one after 2001, and (3) the coexistence of a positive bond risk premium and a negative correlation of stock and bond returns. Our general equilibrium model shows that these correlation changes across two policy regimes are driven by a combination of technology and investment shocks, while positive risk premiums are driven by the technology shock only.\n
27861.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了货币-财政政策互动在解释三个典型事实中的重要作用：（1）1971-2001年股债收益正相关，2001年后负相关；（2）1971-2001年消费与通胀负相关，2001年后正相关；（3）正债券风险溢价与股债收益负相关并存。我们的一般均衡模型表明，这两个政策制度下的相关性变化是由技术和投资冲击的组合驱动的，而正风险溢价仅由技术冲击驱动。

27860.title: Behavioral Biases are Temporally Stable
27860.zh_title: 行为偏差具有时间稳定性
27860.abstract: Social scientists often consider temporal stability when assessing the usefulness of a construct and its measures, but whether behavioral biases display such stability is relatively unknown. We estimate stability for 25 biases, in a nationally representative sample, using repeated elicitations three years apart. Bias level indicators are largely stable in the aggregate and within-person. Within-person intertemporal rank correlations imply moderate stability and increase dramatically when using other biases as instrumental variables. Additional results reinforce three key inferences: biases are stable, accounting for classical measurement error in bias elicitation data is important, and eliciting multiple measures of multiple biases is valuable.
27860.zh_abstract: 社会科学家在评估一个构念及其测量方法的有用性时，通常会考虑时间稳定性，但行为偏差是否表现出这种稳定性却相对未知。我们利用一个具有全国代表性的样本，通过相隔三年的重复诱发实验，估计了25种偏差的稳定性。偏差水平指标在总体层面和个体内部基本保持稳定。个体内部的跨期秩相关表明稳定性适中，但在使用其他偏差作为工具变量时，这种稳定性会显著提高。其他结果进一步强化了三个关键推论：偏差是稳定的，在偏差诱发数据中考虑经典测量误差很重要，以及同时诱发多种偏差的多个测量指标是有价值的。
27860.meta: Programs：AG, AP, DEV, EEE, EH, IO, LE, LS, PE；JEL：C36, C81, D90, E70

27859.title: A Return Based Measure of Firm Quality
27859.zh_title: 基于回报的企业质量衡量指标
27859.abstract: We show that superior performance relative to peers during stressful times identifies higher quality firms as measured by conventional historical financial statement based measures as well as default probability measures. Quality measured this way is persistent, but different from price momentum. Further, a managed portfolio that takes a long position in top quintile (Stable) firms and a short position in bottom quintile (Vulnerable) firms earns superior risk adjusted returns in excess of the risk-free rate. The portfolio has an annualized Fama and French three-factor alpha of 5.2% (t=5.04) and a five-factor alpha of 3.3% (t=3.38)
27859.zh_abstract: 我们表明，在压力时期相对于同行的卓越表现能够识别出更高质量的企业，这些企业通过传统的基于历史财务报表的衡量指标以及违约概率指标来衡量。以这种方式衡量的质量具有持续性，但与价格动量不同。此外，一个持有最高五分位（稳定）企业多头头寸和最低五分位（脆弱）企业空头头寸的管理型投资组合，能够获得超过无风险利率的经风险调整后的超额收益。该投资组合的年化Fama-French三因子阿尔法为5.2%（t=5.04），五因子阿尔法为3.3%（t=3.38）。

27858.title: The Aggregate Demand for Bank Capital
27858.authors: Milton Harris, Christian Opp, Marcus Opp
27858.abstract: We propose a novel conceptual approach to transparently characterizing credit market outcomes in economies with multi-dimensional borrower heterogeneity. Based on characterizations of securities' implicit demand for bank equity capital, we obtain closed-form expressions for the composition of credit, including a sufficient statistic for the provision of bank loans, and a novel cross-sectional asset pricing relation for securities held by regulated levered institutions. Our framework sheds light on the compositional shifts in credit prior to the 07/08 financial crisis and the European debt crisis, and can provide guidance on the allocative effects of shocks affecting both banks and the cross-sectional distribution of borrowers.
27858.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新颖的概念方法，用于透明地刻画具有多维借款人异质性的经济体中的信贷市场结果。基于对证券隐含的银行股权资本需求的特征描述，我们得到了信贷构成的闭式表达式，包括一个用于衡量银行贷款供给的充分统计量，以及一个适用于受监管杠杆机构持有的证券的横截面资产定价关系。我们的框架揭示了07/08金融危机和欧洲债务危机之前信贷构成的转变，并可以为同时影响银行和借款人横截面分布的冲击的配置效应提供指导。
27858.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM；JEL：G12, G21, G23, G28

27857.title: Worker Empowerment and Subjective Evaluation: On Building an Effective Conflict Culture
27857.zh_title: 员工赋权与主观评价：构建有效的冲突文化
27857.authors: W. Bentley MacLeod, Victoria Valle Lara, Christian Zehnder
27857.abstract: Although conflicts typically lead to a waste of resources, organizations may still benefit from a corporate culture that tolerates or even encourages conflicts. The reason is that coordinated conflicts may help to enforce informal contracts and foster cooperation. In this paper we report results of a series of laboratory experiments designed to explore whether and under what conditions an efficiency-enhancing conflict culture can emerge. Using a principal-worker setup with subjective performance evaluation, we show that establishing a functional conflict culture is a delicate matter. If conflicts are encouraged in a careless, hands-off manner, the destructive side of conflicts is likely to dominate. To be successful a conflict culture requires a careful management of fairness norms. In our experiment we find that conflicts have positive net effects on efficiency only if an explicit code of conduct is established and conflicts are institutionalized through a grievance process. Thus, providing workers with more power may be a necessary but not sufficient condition for improving productivity when performance evaluations are subjective.
27857.zh_abstract: 尽管冲突通常会导致资源浪费，但组织仍可能从容忍甚至鼓励冲突的企业文化中受益。原因是协调一致的冲突可能有助于执行非正式契约并促进合作。在本文中，我们报告了一系列实验室实验的结果，旨在探讨效率提升型冲突文化是否以及在何种条件下能够出现。我们采用带有主观绩效评估的委托-员工设置，表明建立功能性冲突文化是一件微妙的事情。如果以粗放、不干预的方式鼓励冲突，冲突的破坏性一面很可能占据主导。要成功建立冲突文化，需要谨慎管理公平规范。在我们的实验中，我们发现只有当建立了明确的行为准则并且通过申诉程序将冲突制度化时，冲突才能对效率产生正向净效应。因此，当绩效评估是主观的时，赋予员工更多权力可能是提高生产力的必要条件，但并非充分条件。
27857.meta: Programs：LE, LS；JEL：D02, D03, J33, J41, M5, M52

27856.title: Why Does the Fed Move Markets so Much? A Model of Monetary Policy and Time-Varying Risk Aversion
27856.zh_title: 为什么美联储对市场影响如此之大？一个货币政策与时变风险厌恶的模型
27856.abstract: We build a new model integrating a work-horse New Keynesian model with investor risk aversion that moves with the business cycle. We show that the same habit preferences that explain the equity volatility puzzle in quarterly data also naturally explain the large high-frequency stock response to Federal Funds rate surprises. In the model, a surprise increase in the short-term interest rate lowers output and consumption relative to habit, thereby raising risk aversion and amplifying the fall in stocks. The model explains the positive correlation between changes in breakeven inflation and stock returns around monetary policy announcements with long-term inflation news.
27856.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个新模型，将经典的新凯恩斯模型与随经济周期变动的投资者风险厌恶相结合。我们表明，能够解释季度数据中股权波动之谜的相同习惯偏好，也自然能够解释股票对联邦基金利率意外变动的大幅高频反应。在该模型中，短期利率的意外上升会降低产出和消费（相对于习惯水平），从而提高风险厌恶程度并放大股票下跌。该模型用长期通胀新闻解释了在货币政策公告前后，盈亏平衡通胀率变化与股票回报之间的正相关关系。

27855.title: A Counterfactual Economic Analysis of Covid-19 Using a Threshold Augmented Multi-Country Model
27855.zh_title: 使用阈值增强的多国模型对新冠疫情进行反事实经济分析
27855.authors: Alexander Chudik, Kamiar Mohaddes, M. Hashem Pesaran, Mehdi Raissi, Alessandro Rebucci
27855.abstract: This paper develops a threshold-augmented dynamic multi-country model (TGVAR) to quantify the macroeconomic effects of Covid-19. We show that there exist threshold effects in the relationship between output growth and excess global volatility at individual country levels in a significant majority of advanced economies and in the case of several emerging markets. We then estimate a more general multi-country model augmented with these threshold effects as well as long term interest rates, oil prices, exchange rates and equity returns to perform counterfactual analyses. We distinguish common global factors from trade-related spillovers, and identify the Covid-19 shock using GDP growth forecast revisions of the IMF in 2020Q1. We account for sample uncertainty by bootstrapping the multi-country model estimated over four decades of quarterly observations. Our results show that the Covid-19 pandemic will lead to a significant fall in world output that is most likely long-lasting, with outcomes that are quite heterogeneous across countries and regions. While the impact on China and other emerging Asian economies are estimated to be less severe, the United States, the United Kingdom, and several other advanced economies may experience deeper and longer-lasting effects. Non-Asian emerging markets stand out for their vulnerability. We show that no country is immune to the economic fallout of the pandemic because of global interconnections as evidenced by the case of Sweden. We also find that long-term interest rates could fall significantly below their recent lows in core advanced economies, but this does not seem to be the case in emerging markets.
27855.zh_abstract: 本文开发了一个阈值增强的动态多国模型（TGVAR），以量化新冠疫情（Covid-19）的宏观经济影响。我们表明，在绝大多数发达经济体和一些新兴市场国家中，产出增长与全球超额波动率之间的关系存在阈值效应。然后，我们估计了一个更一般的多国模型，该模型加入了这些阈值效应以及长期利率、油价、汇率和股票回报，以进行反事实分析。我们区分了共同的全球因素和与贸易相关的溢出效应，并使用国际货币基金组织（IMF）在2020年第一季度对GDP增长预测的修正来识别新冠疫情冲击。我们通过对基于四十年季度观测数据估计的多国模型进行自助法（bootstrap）来考虑样本不确定性。我们的结果表明，新冠疫情将导致世界产出显著下降，且这种下降很可能持续很长时间，各国和各地区的结果差异很大。虽然对中国和其他亚洲新兴经济体的影响估计较轻，但美国、英国和其他几个发达经济体可能经历更深重和更持久的影响。非亚洲新兴市场因其脆弱性而尤为突出。我们表明，由于全球互联性，没有哪个国家能免受疫情的经济冲击，瑞典的情况就证明了这一点。我们还发现，核心发达经济体的长期利率可能大幅低于其近期低点，但新兴市场似乎并非如此。

27854.title: War, Socialism and the Rise of Fascism: An Empirical Exploration
27854.zh_title: 战争、社会主义与法西斯主义的兴起：一项实证探索
27854.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Giuseppe De Feo, Giacomo De Luca, Gianluca Russo
27854.abstract: The recent ascent of right-wing populist movements in many countries has rekindled interest in understanding the causes of the rise of Fascism in inter-war years. In this paper, we argue that there was a strong link between the surge of support for the Socialist Party after World War I (WWI) and the subsequent emergence of Fascism in Italy. We first develop a source of variation in Socialist support across Italian municipalities in the 1919 election based on war casualties from the area. We show that these casualties are unrelated to a battery of political, economic and social variables before the war and had a major impact on Socialist support (partly because the Socialists were the main anti-war political movement). Our main result is that this boost to Socialist support (that is “exogenous” to the prior political leaning of the municipality) led to greater local Fascist activity as measured by local party branches and Fascist political violence (squadrismo), and to significantly larger vote share of the Fascist Party in the 1924 election. We document that the increase in the vote share of the Fascist Party was not at the expense of the Socialist Party and instead came from right-wing parties, thus supporting our interpretation that center-right and right-wing voters coalesced around the Fascist Party because of the “red scare”. We also show that the veterans did not consistently support the Fascist Party and there is no evidence for greater nationalist sentiment in areas with more casualties. We provide evidence that landowner associations and greater presence of local elites played an important role in the rise of Fascism. Finally, we find greater likelihood of Jewish deportations in 1943-45 and lower vote share for Christian Democrats after World War II in areas with greater early Fascist activity.
27854.zh_abstract: 近年来许多国家右翼民粹主义运动的兴起，重新激发了人们对理解两次世界大战期间法西斯主义兴起原因的兴趣。在本文中，我们认为，第一次世界大战后社会主义党支持率的激增与意大利随后法西斯主义的出现之间存在紧密联系。我们首先基于该地区的战争伤亡人数，构建了1919年选举中意大利各市镇社会主义支持率的一个变异来源。我们表明，这些伤亡人数与战前的一系列政治、经济和社会变量无关，并对社会主义支持率产生了重大影响（部分原因是社会主义者是主要的反战政治运动）。我们的主要结果是，这种对社会主义支持率的提升（相对于该市镇先前的政治倾向是“外生的”）导致了更大的地方法西斯活动，表现为地方党支部和法西斯政治暴力（squadrismo），并在1924年选举中显著增加了法西斯党的得票率。我们记录到，法西斯党得票率的增加并非以牺牲社会主义党为代价，而是来自右翼政党，这支持了我们的解释，即中右翼和右翼选民因“红色恐慌”而团结在法西斯党周围。我们还表明，退伍军人并未一致支持法西斯党，也没有证据表明伤亡人数更多的地区存在更强的民族主义情绪。我们提供了证据，表明地主协会和更多地方精英的存在在法西斯主义的兴起中发挥了重要作用。最后，我们发现，在早期法西斯活动更活跃的地区，1943-45年犹太人被驱逐的可能性更大，二战后基督教民主党的得票率也更低。

27853.title: What Is CEO Overconfidence? Evidence from Executive Assessments
27853.zh_title: 什么是CEO过度自信？来自高管评估的证据
27853.authors: Steven N. Kaplan, Morten Sorensen, Anastasia A. Zakolyukina
27853.abstract: We use detailed assessments of CEO personalities to explore the option-based measure of CEO overconfidence, Longholder, introduced by Malmendier and Tate (2005a) and widely used in the behavioral corporate finance and economics literatures. Longholder is significantly related to several specific characteristics and is negatively related to general ability. These relations also hold for overconfidence measures derived from CEOs’ earnings guidance. Investment-cash flow sensitivities are larger for both Longholder and less able CEOs. Overall, Longholder CEOs have many of the same characteristics traditionally associated with overconfident individuals, including lower general ability, supporting the interpretation of this measure as reflecting overconfidence.
27853.zh_abstract: 我们利用对CEO个性的详细评估，来探讨由Malmendier和Tate（2005a）提出并在行为公司金融和经济学文献中广泛使用的基于期权的CEO过度自信衡量指标——Longholder。Longholder与几个特定特征显著相关，并且与一般能力负相关。这些关系也适用于从CEO盈利指引中得出的过度自信衡量指标。投资-现金流敏感性对于Longholder型CEO和能力较弱的CEO都更大。总体而言，Longholder型CEO具有许多传统上与过度自信个体相关的相同特征，包括较低的一般能力，这支持了将该指标解释为反映过度自信的观点。

27852.title: Institutional Change and Institutional Persistence
27852.zh_title: 制度变迁与制度持续性
27852.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Georgy Egorov, Konstantin Sonin
27852.abstract: In this essay, we provide a simple conceptual framework to elucidate the forces that lead to institutional persistence and change. Our framework is based on a dynamic game between different groups, who care both about current policies and institutions and future policies, which are themselves determined by current institutional choices, and clarifies the forces that lead to the most extreme form of institutional persistence (“institutional stasis”) and the potential drivers of institutional change. We further study the strategic stability of institutions, which arises when institutions persist because of fear of subsequent, less beneficial changes that would follow initial reforms. More importantly, we emphasize that, despite the popularity of ideas based on institutional stasis in the economics and political science literatures, most institutions are in a constant state of flux, but their trajectory may still be shaped by past institutional choices, thus exhibiting “path-dependent change”, so that initial conditions determine both the subsequent trajectories of institutions and how they respond to shocks. We conclude the essay by discussing how institutions can be designed to bolster stability, the relationship between social mobility and institutions, and the interplay between culture and institutions.
27852.zh_abstract: 本文提供了一个简单的概念框架，用以阐明导致制度持续性与制度变迁的力量。该框架基于不同群体之间的动态博弈，这些群体既关心当前的政策和制度，也关心未来的政策——而未来政策本身又由当前的制度选择决定。框架阐明了导致最极端制度持续性形式（“制度停滞”）的力量，以及制度变迁的潜在驱动因素。我们进一步研究了制度的战略稳定性，这种稳定性产生于制度因担心初始改革后可能出现的、后续不利变化而得以持续。更重要的是，我们强调，尽管基于制度停滞的观点在经济学和政治学文献中颇为流行，但大多数制度实际上处于持续变动状态，不过其轨迹仍可能受到过去制度选择的影响，从而表现出“路径依赖式变迁”，即初始条件既决定了制度的后续演进轨迹，也决定了制度如何应对冲击。最后，我们讨论了如何设计制度以增强稳定性、社会流动性与制度之间的关系，以及文化与制度之间的相互作用。
27852.meta: Programs：POL；JEL：C73, D72, D74, N10, N40, P16

27851.title: Crisis Innovation
27851.authors: Tania Babina, Asaf Bernstein, Filippo Mezzanotti
27851.abstract: The effect of financial crises on innovation is an unsettled and important question for economic growth, but one difficult to answer with modern data. Using a differences-in-differences design surrounding the Great Depression, we document that local distress caused a sudden and persistent decline in patenting by the largest organizational form of innovation at this time—technological entrepreneurs. Parallel trends prior to the shock, evidence of a drop within every major technology class, and consistent results using distress driven by commodity shocks—all suggest a causal effect of distress. Despite this, we find that innovation during crises can be more resilient than it may appear at first glance. First, there is no observable change in the number of future citations, despite the decline in the number of patents filed. Second, the shock is in part absorbed through a reallocation of inventors into firms, who over the long-run produce patents with greater impact. Third, the results reveal no immediate brain drain of inventors from the affected areas. Overall, we demonstrate that crises can be both destructive and creative forces for innovation, and provide the first systematic evidence of the role played by the Great Depression in the long-run organization of innovative activity.
27851.zh_abstract: 金融危机对创新的影响是一个尚未解决且对经济增长至关重要的问题，但用现代数据难以回答。利用围绕大萧条的双重差分设计，我们记录了地方性困境导致当时最大的创新组织形式——技术型企业家——的专利申请活动出现突然且持续的下降。冲击前的平行趋势、每个主要技术类别内部专利申请量下降的证据，以及利用商品冲击驱动的困境所得出的一致结果，都表明困境具有因果效应。尽管如此，我们发现危机期间的创新可能比初看起来更具韧性。首先，尽管专利申请数量下降，但未来被引次数没有可观测的变化。其次，冲击在一定程度上通过发明人向企业重新配置而被吸收，这些发明人在长期内会产出影响力更大的专利。第三，结果并未显示受影响地区出现发明人的即时人才流失。总体而言，我们证明了危机对创新而言既可以是破坏性力量，也可以是创造性力量，并首次系统性地提供了大萧条在创新活动长期组织中所扮演角色的证据。
27851.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, EFG, PR；JEL：G01, G21, N12, N22, N32, O3

27850.title: History and Urban Economics
27850.abstract: This article reviews recent literature using insights from history to answer central questions in urban economics. This area of research has seen rapid growth in the past decade, thanks to new technologies that have made available increasingly rich data stretching far back in time. The focus is to review innovative methods to exploit historical information and discuss applications of these data that provide new insights into (i) the long run growth of cities or regional economies and (ii) the spatial organization of economic activities within cities. The review also surveys the growing literature outside urban economics that uses the historical urbanization as a proxy for economic growth, discusses differences between how economic historians and urban economists think about the relationship between urbanization and growth, and considers how these views might be reconciled.
27850.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了近期利用历史洞见来回答城市经济学核心问题的文献。得益于新技术使得时间跨度越来越大的丰富数据变得可用，这一研究领域在过去十年中经历了快速增长。本文的重点是回顾利用历史信息的创新方法，并讨论这些数据的应用如何为以下方面提供新见解：（i）城市或区域经济的长期增长，以及（ii）经济活动在城市内部的空间组织。本文还综述了城市经济学之外日益增长的、将历史城市化作为经济增长代理变量的文献，讨论了经济史学家与城市经济学家在看待城市化与增长关系上的差异，并思考了这些观点如何可能被调和。

27849.title: Fifty Shades of QE: Comparing Findings of Central Bankers and Academics
27849.zh_title: 量化宽松的五十种色调：比较央行官员与学术研究者的发现
27849.authors: Brian Fabo, Martina Jančoková, Elisabeth Kempf, Ľuboš Pástor
27849.abstract: We compare the findings of central bank researchers and academic economists regarding the macroeconomic effects of quantitative easing (QE). We find that central bank papers find QE to be more effective than academic papers do. Central bank papers report larger effects of QE on output and inflation. They also report QE effects on output that are more significant, both statistically and economically, and they use more positive language in the abstract. Central bank researchers who report larger QE effects on output experience more favorable career outcomes. A survey of central banks reveals substantial involvement of bank management in research production.\n
27849.zh_abstract: 我们比较了央行研究人员和学术经济学家关于量化宽松（QE）宏观经济效应的研究结果。我们发现，央行论文认为QE比学术论文更有效。央行论文报告了QE对产出和通胀的更大影响。它们还报告了QE对产出的影响在统计上和经济上都更为显著，并且在摘要中使用了更积极的语言。报告QE对产出影响更大的央行研究人员，其职业发展结果更为有利。一项对央行的调查显示，银行管理层在研究产出中参与了大量工作。
27849.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：A11, E52, E58, G28

27848.title: A Satellite Account for Health in the United States
27848.authors: David M. Cutler, Kaushik Ghosh, Kassandra Messer, Trivellore Raghunathan, Allison B. Rosen, Susan T. Stewart
27848.abstract: This paper develops a satellite account for the US health sector and measures productivity growth in health care for the elderly population between 1999 and 2012. We measure the change in medical spending and health outcomes for a comprehensive set of 80 conditions. Medical care has positive productivity growth over the time period, with aggregate productivity growth of 1.5% per year. However, there is significant heterogeneity in productivity growth. Care for cardiovascular disease has had very high productivity growth. In contrast, care for people with musculoskeletal conditions has been costly but has not led to improved outcomes.
27848.zh_abstract: 本文为美国卫生部门开发了一个卫星账户，并衡量了1999年至2012年间老年人口医疗保健的生产率增长。我们衡量了涵盖80种疾病的综合医疗支出和健康结果的变化。在此期间，医疗保健具有正的生产率增长，总体生产率增长为每年1.5%。然而，生产率增长存在显著的异质性。心血管疾病的护理具有非常高的生产率增长。相比之下，对肌肉骨骼疾病患者的护理成本高昂，但并未带来改善的结果。
27848.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PR；JEL：E2, I10, I11, I12, I38

27847.title: The Economics of Currency Risk
27847.abstract: This article reviews the literature on currency and country risk with a focus on its macroeconomic origins and implications. A growing body of evidence shows countries with safer currencies enjoy persistently lower interest rates and a lower required return to capital. As a result, they accumulate relatively more capital than countries with currencies international investors perceive as risky. Whereas earlier research focused mainly on the role of currency risk in generating violations of uncovered interest parity and other financial anomalies, more recent evidence points to important implications for the allocation of capital across countries, the efficacy of exchange rate stabilization policies, the sustainability of trade deficits, and the spillovers of shocks across international borders.
27847.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了关于货币风险和国家风险的文献，重点关注其宏观经济起源和影响。越来越多的证据表明，拥有更安全货币的国家享有持续较低的利率和较低的资本必要回报率。因此，与国际投资者认为有风险的货币国家相比，它们积累了相对更多的资本。早期研究主要关注货币风险在导致无抛补利率平价失效和其他金融异象中的作用，而近期证据则指出了其对国家间资本配置、汇率稳定政策有效性、贸易赤字可持续性以及冲击跨国溢出效应的重要影响。
27847.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E22, E4, F31, F34, F4, G12, G15, G3

27899.title: Wealth Transfers and Net Wealth at Death: Evidence from the Italian Inheritance Tax Records 1995–2016
27899.zh_title: 财富转移与死亡时净财富：来自意大利1995-2016年遗产税记录的证据
27899.abstract: In this paper we describe a novel source of data on the full record of inheritance tax files in Italy, covering up to 63% of total deceased. The work documents a substantial rise in the total value of inheritance and gifts as a share of national income, from 8.4% in 1995 to 15.1% in 2016. Consistent with the increasing role of total personal net wealth in the economy, the weight of inheritance and gifts in Italy appears relatively high by international standards. Over the same period, total wealth left at death has also become increasingly concentrated. The estates valued at least one million Euro were worth 18.7% of total estate in the mid 1990s and 24.8% in 2016. This paper also documents that revenues collected from the inheritance tax underwent a large decline from 0.14% to 0.06% of total tax revenue between 1995 and 2016. Data also allow a disaggregated analysis by demographic and geographic characteristics.
27899.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们描述了一个关于意大利遗产税档案完整记录的新数据来源，覆盖高达63%的死亡人口。该研究记录了遗产和赠与总价值占国民收入比重的显著上升，从1995年的8.4%增至2016年的15.1%。与个人净财富总额在经济中日益增长的作用一致，意大利遗产和赠与的比重按国际标准来看相对较高。同期，死亡时留下的总财富也变得越来越集中。价值至少100万欧元的遗产在1990年代中期占总遗产的18.7%，到2016年达到24.8%。本文还记录了遗产税收入从1995年占税收总额的0.14%大幅下降至2016年的0.06%。数据还允许按人口和地理特征进行分解分析。

27898.title: Monetary Policy Cooperation/Coordination and Global Financial Crises in Historical Perspective
27898.zh_title: 历史视角下的货币政策合作/协调与全球金融危机
27898.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic spawned a global liquidity crisis in March 2020. The global liquidity crisis was alleviated by the Federal Reserve and other advanced country central banks cooperating by extending the swap lines they developed in the Global Financial Crisis 2007-2008. Central bank cooperation in 2020 evolved from a two-century history across several monetary regimes that is surveyed in this paper. I find that in monetary regimes which are rules-based cooperation was most successful. International currency swaps developed to manage exchange rates during the Bretton Woods era have evolved into the leading tool to manage international liquidity crises. The swap network can be viewed as a step in the direction of a global financial safety net.
27898.zh_abstract: COVID-19大流行在2020年3月引发了一场全球流动性危机。这场全球流动性危机通过美联储和其他发达国家央行合作，扩展其在2007-2008年全球金融危机中建立的互换额度而得到缓解。2020年的央行合作源于本文所考察的跨越两个世纪、历经多种货币制度的历史。我发现，在基于规则的货币制度中，合作最为成功。在布雷顿森林体系时代为管理汇率而发展起来的国际货币互换，已演变为管理国际流动性危机的主要工具。互换网络可以被视为朝着全球金融安全网方向迈出的一步。

27897.title: Digital Messaging to Improve College Enrollment and Success
27897.zh_title: 数字信息传递改善大学入学与成功
27897.authors: Christopher Avery, Benjamin L. Castleman, Michael Hurwitz, Bridget T. Long, Lindsay C. Page
27897.abstract: We investigate the efficacy of text messaging campaigns to remind students about and support them with key steps in the college search, application, selection and transition process. First, in collaboration with the College Board and uAspire, both national non-profit organizations, we implemented text-message based outreach and advising to students in over 700 US high schools that primarily serve large shares of low-income students. Second, we collaborated with several school districts in the state of Texas to implement a school-based version of the intervention. In the national sample, treatment students received outreach approximately once per month from uAspire counselors, whereas in the Texas sample, treatment students received outreach once every one to two weeks from their high school counselors. In both samples, outreach began in Spring 2015 and continued through September 2016. We tested these interventions with concurrent cluster randomized control trials with randomization at the school level. In contrast to the national version of the intervention, which tended to produce null effects, the school-based intervention yielded positive and significant impacts on several college-going steps and on college enrollment for certain subgroups. We discuss key differences between the two versions of the intervention that may have contributed to these divergent results.
27897.zh_abstract: 我们研究了短信提醒活动在提醒学生并支持他们完成大学搜索、申请、选择和过渡过程中的关键步骤方面的有效性。首先，我们与全国性非营利组织大学理事会和uAspire合作，向美国700多所主要服务大量低收入学生的高中的学生实施了基于短信的外展和咨询。其次，我们与德克萨斯州的几个学区合作，实施了一个基于学校的干预版本。在全国样本中，治疗组学生大约每月从uAspire顾问那里收到一次外展信息，而在德克萨斯州样本中，治疗组学生每1-2周从他们的高中顾问那里收到一次外展信息。在两个样本中，外展活动均始于2015年春季，持续到2016年9月。我们通过在学校层面随机化的并行整群随机对照试验测试了这些干预措施。与倾向于产生零效应的全国版干预相比，基于学校的干预对某些子群体的几个大学入学步骤和大学入学率产生了积极且显著的影响。我们讨论了两种干预版本之间可能导致这些不同结果的关键差异。

27896.title: Measuring the Effects of Firm Uncertainty on Economic Activity: New Evidence from One Million Documents
27896.zh_title: 衡量企业不确定性对经济活动的影响：来自一百万份文件的新证据
27896.abstract: We construct a new measure of firm-level uncertainty from analyzing the text of mandatory reports filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Using firm and establishment level panel data on investment margins and employment dynamics, we find our uncertainty measure has large effects on investment even after controlling for industry and time-varying shocks. Periods of high firm uncertainty (1) reduce investment rates by 0.5% and attenuate the response to positive sales shocks by about half and (2) reduce employment growth rates by 1.4% and the response to positive sales shocks by 30%. Firms are less responsive to demand shocks at the firm level and across establishments within the firm. Consistent with “wait and see” dynamics, uncertainty affects new investment activity, e.g. plant births and acquisition, more than disinvestment margins.
27896.zh_abstract: 我们通过分析提交给美国证券交易委员会的强制性报告文本，构建了一个新的企业层面不确定性衡量指标。利用企业和机构层面关于投资边际和就业动态的面板数据，我们发现即使在控制了行业和时变冲击之后，我们的不确定性衡量指标对投资也有很大影响。高企业不确定性时期（1）使投资率降低0.5%，并将对正向销售冲击的反应减弱约一半；（2）使就业增长率降低1.4%，并将对正向销售冲击的反应减弱30%。企业在企业层面以及企业内部各机构之间对需求冲击的反应都较小。与“观望”动态一致，不确定性对新投资活动（如工厂诞生和收购）的影响大于对撤资边际的影响。

27895.title: Discovering Treatment Effectiveness via Median Treatment Effects—Applications to COVID-19 Clinical Trials
27895.zh_title: 通过中位数治疗效果发现治疗有效性——在COVID-19临床试验中的应用
27895.abstract: Comparing median outcomes to gauge treatment effectiveness is widespread practice in clinical and other investigations. While common, such difference-in-median characterizations of effectiveness are but one way to summarize how outcome distributions compare. This paper explores properties of median treatment effects as indicators of treatment effectiveness. The paper's main focus is on decisionmaking based on median treatment effects and it proceeds by considering two paths a decisionmaker might follow. Along one, decisions are based on point-identified differences in medians alongside partially identified median differences; along the other decisions are based on point-identified differences in medians in conjunction with other point-identified parameters. On both paths familiar difference-in-median measures play some role yet in both the traditional standards are augmented with information that will often be relevant in assessing treatments' effectiveness. Implementing both approaches is shown to be straightforward. In addition to its analytical results the paper considers several policy contexts in which such considerations arise. While the paper is framed by recently reported findings on treatments for COVID-19 and uses several such studies to explore empirically some properties of median-treatment-effect measures of effectiveness, its results should be broadly applicable.
27895.zh_abstract: 比较中位数结果以衡量治疗有效性在临床和其他研究中是普遍做法。虽然常见，但这种中位数差异对有效性的描述只是总结结果分布比较的一种方式。本文探讨了中位数治疗效果作为治疗有效性指标的特性。本文的主要焦点是基于中位数治疗效果的决策，并通过考虑决策者可能遵循的两条路径进行。沿着一条路径，决策基于点识别的中位数差异以及部分识别的中位数差异；沿着另一条路径，决策基于点识别的中位数差异以及其他点识别参数。在这两条路径上，熟悉的中位数差异衡量指标都发挥了一定作用，然而在这两种情况下，传统标准都补充了通常与评估治疗有效性相关的信息。实施这两种方法被证明是直接的。除了分析结果外，本文还考虑了出现此类考虑的几个政策背景。虽然本文以最近报道的COVID-19治疗发现为框架，并利用其中几项研究来实证探索中位数治疗效果衡量指标有效性的某些特性，但其结果应具有广泛适用性。

27894.title: Flexible Wages, Bargaining, and the Gender Gap
27894.zh_title: 弹性工资、谈判与性别差距
27894.abstract: Does flexible pay increase the gender wage gap? To answer this question we analyze the wages of public-school teachers in Wisconsin, where a 2011 reform allowed school districts to set teachers' pay more flexibly and engage in individual negotiations. Using quasi-exogenous variation in the timing of the introduction of flexible pay driven by the expiration of pre-existing collective-bargaining agreements, we show that flexible pay increased the gender pay gap among teachers with the same credentials. This gap is larger for younger teachers and absent for teachers working under a female principal or superintendent. Survey evidence suggests that the gap is partly driven by women not engaging in negotiations over pay, especially when the counterpart is a man. This gap is not driven by gender differences in job mobility, ability, or a higher demand for male teachers. We conclude that environmental factors are an important determinant of the gender wage gap in contexts where workers are required to negotiate.
27894.zh_abstract: 弹性薪酬是否会扩大性别工资差距？为了回答这个问题，我们分析了威斯康星州公立学校教师的工资，该州2011年的一项改革允许学区更灵活地设定教师薪酬并进行个人谈判。利用由现有集体谈判协议到期驱动的弹性薪酬引入时间的准外生变化，我们表明弹性薪酬增加了具有相同资历的教师之间的性别薪酬差距。这种差距在年轻教师中更大，而在女性校长或学监领导下工作的教师中则不存在。调查证据表明，这种差距部分是由女性不参与薪酬谈判所驱动的，尤其是当对方是男性时。这种差距并非由性别在职业流动性、能力或对男教师更高需求方面的差异所驱动。我们得出结论，在需要工人进行谈判的环境中，环境因素是性别工资差距的重要决定因素。

27893.title: Concessions, Violence, and Indirect Rule: Evidence from the Congo Free State
27893.zh_title: 特许经营权、暴力与间接统治：来自刚果自由邦的证据
27893.abstract: All colonial powers granted concessions to private companies to extract natural resources during the colonial era. Within Africa, these concessions were characterized by indirect rule and violence. We use the arbitrarily defined borders of rubber concessions granted in the north of the Congo Free State to examine the causal effects of this form of economic organization on development. We find that historical exposure to the concessions causes significantly worse education, wealth, and health outcomes. To examine mechanisms, we collect survey and experimental data from individuals near a former concession boundary. We find that village chiefs inside the former concessions provide fewer public goods, are less likely to be elected, and are more likely to be hereditary. However, individuals within the concessions are more trusting, more cohesive, and more supportive of sharing income. The results are relevant for the many places that were designated as concessions to private companies during the colonial era.
27893.zh_abstract: 所有殖民列强在殖民时代都向私营公司授予特许经营权以开采自然资源。在非洲内部，这些特许经营权的特点是间接统治和暴力。我们利用刚果自由邦北部橡胶特许经营权任意划定的边界来考察这种经济组织形式对发展的因果效应。我们发现，历史上接触特许经营权会导致显著更差的教育、财富和健康结果。为了考察机制，我们收集了前特许经营权边界附近个体的调查和实验数据。我们发现，前特许经营权内部的村长提供的公共物品更少，当选的可能性更低，且更可能是世袭的。然而，特许经营权内部的个体更加信任、更有凝聚力，并且更支持收入共享。这些结果对于殖民时代被指定为私营公司特许经营权的许多地方具有相关性。
27893.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, POL；JEL：D72, N47, O15, O43, Z1, Z13

27892.title: The Global Factor Structure of Exchange Rates
27892.authors: Sofonias Korsaye, Fabio Trojani, Andrea Vedolin
27892.abstract: We provide a model-free framework to study the global factor structure of exchange rates. To this end, we propose a new methodology to estimate international stochastic discount factors (SDFs) that jointly price cross-sections of international assets, such as stocks, bonds, and currencies, in the presence of frictions. We theoretically establish a two-factor representation for the cross-section of international SDFs, consisting of one global and one local factor, which is independent of the currency denomination. We show that our two-factor specification prices a large cross-section of international asset returns, not just in- but also out-of-sample with R2s of up to 80%.
27892.zh_abstract: 我们提供了一个无模型框架来研究汇率的全球因子结构。为此，我们提出了一种新方法来估计国际随机贴现因子（SDFs），该因子在存在摩擦的情况下共同为国际资产（如股票、债券和货币）的横截面定价。我们从理论上建立了国际SDFs横截面的双因子表示，由一个全球因子和一个局部因子组成，该表示独立于计价货币。我们证明，我们的双因子规范为国际资产收益的大横截面定价，不仅在样本内，而且在样本外，R²高达80%。

27891.title: Face Masks, Public Policies and Slowing the Spread of COVID-19: Evidence from Canada
27891.zh_title: 口罩、公共政策与减缓COVID-19传播：来自加拿大的证据
27891.authors: Alexander Karaivanov, Shih En Lu, Hitoshi Shigeoka, Cong Chen, Stephanie Pamplona
27891.abstract: We estimate the impact of mask mandates and other non-pharmaceutical interventions (NPI) on COVID-19 case growth in Canada, including regulations on businesses and gatherings, school closures, travel and self-isolation, and long-term care homes. We partially account for behavioral responses using Google mobility data. Our identification approach exploits variation in the timing of indoor face mask mandates staggered over two months in the 34 public health regions in Ontario, Canada's most populous province. We find that, in the first few weeks after implementation, mask mandates are associated with a reduction of 25 percent in the weekly number of new COVID-19 cases. Additional analysis with province-level data provides corroborating evidence. Counterfactual policy simulations suggest that mandating indoor masks nationwide in early July could have reduced the weekly number of new cases in Canada by 25 to 40 percent in mid-August, which translates into 700 to 1,100 fewer cases per week.
27891.zh_abstract: 我们估计了口罩强制令和其他非药物干预措施（NPI）对加拿大COVID-19病例增长的影响，包括对企业与集会的监管、学校关闭、旅行与自我隔离以及长期护理机构。我们部分利用谷歌移动数据来考虑行为反应。我们的识别方法利用了加拿大人口最多的省份安大略省34个公共卫生区域在两个月内交错实施的室内口罩强制令的时间差异。我们发现，在实施后的最初几周内，口罩强制令与每周新增COVID-19病例数减少25%相关。使用省级数据的额外分析提供了佐证。反事实政策模拟表明，如果在7月初全国范围内强制要求室内佩戴口罩，到8月中旬加拿大每周新增病例数可能减少25%至40%，相当于每周减少700至1100例病例。

27890.title: Rules vs. Discretion: Treatment of Mental Illness in U.S. Adolescents
27890.zh_title: 规则与自由裁量权：美国青少年精神疾病的治疗
27890.abstract: Many mental health disorders start in adolescence and appropriate initial treatment may improve trajectories. But what is appropriate treatment? We use a large national database of insurance claims to examine the impact of initial mental health treatment on the outcomes of adolescent children over the next two years, where treatment is either consistent with FDA guidelines, consistent with looser guidelines published by professional societies (“grey-area” prescribing), or inconsistent with any guidelines (“red-flag” prescribing). We find that red-flag prescribing increases self-harm, use of emergency rooms, and health care costs, suggesting that treatment guidelines effectively scale up good treatment in practice.
27890.zh_abstract: 许多精神健康障碍始于青春期，适当的初始治疗可能会改善发展轨迹。但什么是适当的治疗？我们使用一个大型的国家保险索赔数据库，研究初始精神健康治疗对青少年儿童未来两年结果的影响，其中治疗要么符合FDA指南，要么符合专业协会发布的较宽松指南（“灰色地带”处方），要么不符合任何指南（“红旗”处方）。我们发现，“红旗”处方会增加自残、急诊室使用和医疗保健成本，这表明治疗指南在实践中有效地推广了良好的治疗。

27889.title: Private Equity and COVID-19
27889.authors: Paul A. Gompers, Steven N. Kaplan, Vladimir Mukharlyamov
27889.abstract: We survey more than 200 private equity (PE) managers from firms with $\$1.9$ trillion of assets under management (AUM) about their portfolio performance, decisionmaking and activities during the Covid-19 pandemic. Given that PE managers have significant incentives to maximize value, their actions during the current pandemic should indicate what they perceive as being important for both the preservation and creation of value. PE managers believe that 40% of their portfolio companies are moderately negatively affected and 10% are very negatively affected by the pandemic. The private equity managers—both investment and operating partners— are actively engaged in the operations, governance, and financing in all of their current portfolio companies. These activities are more intensively pursued in those companies that have been more severely affected by the Covid-19 pandemic. As a result of the pandemic, they expect the performance of their existing funds to decline. They are more pessimistic about that decline than the VCs surveyed in Gompers et al. (2020b). Despite the pandemic, private equity managers are seeking new investments. Relative to the 2012 survey results reported in Gompers, Kaplan, and Mukharlyamov (2016): the PE investors place a greater weight on revenue growth for value creation; they give a larger equity stake to management teams; and, they also appear to target somewhat lower returns.
27889.zh_abstract: 我们调查了来自管理资产总额达1.9万亿美元的公司的200多名私募股权（PE）经理，了解他们在COVID-19大流行期间的投资组合表现、决策和活动。鉴于PE经理有显著的激励来最大化价值，他们在当前大流行期间的行动应表明他们认为什么对价值保存和创造都很重要。PE经理认为，他们40%的投资组合公司受到大流行的中度负面影响，10%受到非常严重的负面影响。私募股权经理——无论是投资合伙人还是运营合伙人——都积极参与其所有当前投资组合公司的运营、治理和融资。这些活动在那些受COVID-19大流行影响更严重的公司中更为密集地开展。由于大流行，他们预计现有基金的表现将下降。他们对这种下降的悲观程度高于Gompers等人（2020b）调查的风险投资家。尽管有大流行，私募股权经理仍在寻求新的投资。相对于Gompers、Kaplan和Mukharlyamov（2016）报告的2012年调查结果：PE投资者更重视收入增长以创造价值；他们给予管理团队更大的股权份额；而且，他们似乎也设定了略低的回报目标。

27888.title: Calculating DAF Payout and What We Learn When We Do It Correctly
27888.zh_title: 正确计算DAF支出率及其启示
27888.abstract: The tremendous increase in the use of donor-advised funds for charitable donations has led policy-makers to ask if there is sufficient regulation and oversight of DAFs. In the absence of account level reporting, the debate has focused on the average payout rates of DAF sponsoring organizations, which have been reported by the DAF industry to exceed 20%. We show that the industry-preferred method for calculating payout rate overstates the correct payout by more than 50%. We then argue that the flow rate is uninformative unless grounded in the stock of assets held by the DAF sponsor. We suggest a different measure of flow we call the stockpiling rate. Finally, we show that transfers between DAFSs cause DAF grants to be overstated. Reporting transfers separately would allow a more precise estimate of flow.
27888.zh_abstract: 捐赠者建议基金（DAF）用于慈善捐赠的急剧增加，导致政策制定者质疑对DAF的监管和监督是否充分。在缺乏账户层面报告的情况下，争论集中在DAF赞助组织的平均支出率上，DAF行业报告该比率超过20%。我们表明，行业偏好的支出率计算方法将正确的支出率高估了50%以上。然后，我们认为，除非基于DAF赞助商持有的资产存量，否则流量率是无信息的。我们提出了一种不同的流量衡量指标，称为囤积率。最后，我们表明，DAF之间的转移导致DAF赠款被高估。单独报告转移将允许更精确地估计流量。

27887.title: When Information is Not Enough: Evidence from a Centralized School Choice System
27887.zh_title: 当信息不足时：来自集中择校系统的证据
27887.authors: Kehinde F. Ajayi, Willa H. Friedman, Adrienne M. Lucas
27887.abstract: Students often make school choice decisions with inadequate information. We present results from delivering information to randomly selected students (and some randomly selected parents) across 900 junior high schools in Ghana, a country with universal secondary school choice. We provided guidance on application strategies and reported the selectivity and exit exam performance of secondary schools, information students and parents prioritized. We find that despite information changing the characteristics of schools to which students applied and students gaining admission to higher value-added schools, they were not more likely to matriculate on time or at all. Information was not the only constraint.
27887.zh_abstract: 学生通常在信息不足的情况下做出择校决定。我们展示了向加纳900所初中随机选择的学生（以及一些随机选择的家长）提供信息的结果，加纳是一个拥有普及高中择校制度的国家。我们提供了关于申请策略的指导，并报告了中学的选择性和毕业考试成绩，这是学生和家长优先考虑的信息。我们发现，尽管信息改变了学生申请的学校特征，并且学生被录取到了增值更高的学校，但他们按时入学或根本入学的可能性并没有增加。信息并非唯一的约束。
27887.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, PE；JEL：D84, I21, I24, I25, O15

27886.title: The Unemployed With Jobs and Without Jobs
27886.zh_title: 有工作的失业者和无工作的失业者
27886.abstract: Potential workers are classified as unemployed if they seek work but are not working. The unemployed population contains two groups—those with jobs and those without jobs. Those with jobs are on furlough or temporary layoff. This group expanded tremendously in April 2020, at the trough of the pandemic recession. They wait out periods of non-work with the understanding that their jobs still exist and that they will be recalled. We show that the resulting temporary-layoff unemployment mostly dissipated by the end of 2020. Potential workers without jobs constitute what we call jobless unemployment. Shocks that elevate jobless unemployment have much more persistent effects. Historical major adverse shocks, such as the financial crisis in 2008, created mostly jobless unemployment and consequently caused extended periods of elevated unemployment. Jobless unemployment reached its pandemic peak in November 2020, at 4.9%, modest by historical standards, and has declined at a faster-than-historical pace since.
27886.zh_abstract: 潜在工人如果正在寻找工作但没有工作，则被归类为失业。失业人口包含两个群体——有工作的和没有工作的。有工作的人处于休假或临时裁员状态。这一群体在2020年4月，即大流行衰退的最低点，急剧扩大。他们在不工作期间等待，并理解他们的工作仍然存在，他们将被召回。我们表明，由此产生的临时裁员失业在2020年底基本消散。没有工作的潜在工人构成了我们所谓的无工作失业。推高无工作失业的冲击具有更持久的影响。历史上的重大不利冲击，例如2008年的金融危机，主要造成了无工作失业，并因此导致了失业率长期居高不下。无工作失业在2020年11月达到大流行峰值4.9%，按历史标准衡量是温和的，并且此后以快于历史的速度下降。

27885.title: State Investment in Higher Education: Effects on Human Capital Formation, Student Debt, and Long-term Financial Outcomes of Students
27885.zh_title: 州高等教育投资：对学生人力资本形成、学生债务和长期财务结果的影响
27885.authors: Rajashri Chakrabarti, Nicole Gorton, Michael F. Lovenheim
27885.abstract: Most public colleges and universities rely heavily on state financial support. As state budgets have tightened in recent decades, appropriations for higher education have declined substantially. Despite concerns expressed by policymakers and scholars that the declines in state support have reduced the return to education investment for public sector students, little evidence exists that can identify the causal effect of these funds on long-run outcomes. We present the first such analysis in the literature using new data that leverages the merger of two rich datasets: consumer credit records from the New York Fed's Consumer Credit Panel (CCP) sourced from Equifax and administrative college enrollment and attainment data from the National Student Clearinghouse. We overcome identification concerns related to the endogeneity of state appropriation variation using an instrument that interacts the baseline share of total revenue that comes from state appropriations at each public institution with yearly variation in state-level appropriations. Our analysis is conducted separately for two-year and four-year students, and we analyze individuals into their mid-30s. For four-year students, we find that state appropriation increases lead to substantially lower student debt originations. They also react to appropriation increases by shortening their time to degree, but we find little effect on other outcomes. In the two-year sector, state appropriation increases lead to more collegiate and post-collegiate educational attainment, more educational debt consistent with the increased educational attainment, but lower likelihood of delinquency and default. State support also leads to more car and home ownership with lower adverse debt outcomes, and these students experience substantial increases in their credit score and in the affluence of the neighborhood in which they live. Examining mechanisms, we find state appropriations are passed on to students in the form of lower tuition in the four-year sector with no institutional spending response. For community colleges, we find evidence of both price and quality mechanisms, the latter captured in higher educational resources in key spending categories. These results are consistent with the different pattern of effects we document in the four-year and two-year sectors. Our results underscore the importance of state support for higher education in driving student debt outcomes and the long-run returns to postsecondary investments students experience.
27885.zh_abstract: 大多数公立学院和大学严重依赖州的财政支持。随着近几十年来州预算收紧，高等教育拨款大幅下降。尽管政策制定者和学者担心州支持的减少降低了公立部门学生的教育投资回报，但很少有证据能够识别这些资金对长期结果的因果效应。我们利用新数据进行了文献中的首次此类分析，该数据融合了两个丰富的数据集：来自纽约联储消费者信贷小组（CCP）的消费者信用记录（源自Equifax）和来自国家学生信息交换所的行政大学入学和毕业数据。我们使用一个工具变量克服了与州拨款变化内生性相关的识别问题，该工具变量将每所公立机构来自州拨款的基线总收入份额与州级拨款的年度变化进行交互。我们的分析分别针对两年制和四年制学生进行，并分析个体直至其30多岁。对于四年制学生，我们发现州拨款增加导致学生债务发放大幅降低。他们还通过缩短获得学位的时间来应对拨款增加，但我们发现对其他结果影响甚微。在两年制部门，州拨款增加导致更高的大学和大学后教育成就，更多的教育债务（与教育成就增加一致），但违约和拖欠的可能性更低。州支持还导致更多的汽车和房屋所有权，同时不良债务结果更少，这些学生的信用评分和他们居住社区的富裕程度都大幅提高。在考察机制时，我们发现州拨款以四年制部门学费降低的形式传递给学生，而机构支出没有反应。对于社区学院，我们发现了价格机制和质量机制的证据，后者体现在关键支出类别中更高的教育资源上。这些结果与我们记录的四年制和两年制部门的不同影响模式一致。我们的结果强调了州对高等教育的支持在推动学生债务结果和学生所经历的中学后投资长期回报方面的重要性。

27884.title: The Effects of Government Licensing on E-commerce: Evidence from Alibaba
27884.zh_title: 政府许可对电子商务的影响：来自阿里巴巴的证据
27884.authors: Ginger Zhe Jin, Zhentong Lu, Xiaolu Zhou, Chunxiao Li
27884.abstract: Using proprietary data from Alibaba, we examine how the 2015 Food Safety Law (FSL) affects e-commerce in China. The FSL requires most food sellers on e-commerce platforms to obtain a valid, online license for retail food handling. Because the FSL was rolled out progressively, we have a rare opportunity to observe a gradual transition from voluntary certification to partial licensing and mandatory licensing.\nData summary shows that, conditional on sellers with valid licensing information, those that had a better online reputation and more online food sales before FSL tend to display their FSL license earlier on the platform, and buyers are more willing to transact with a seller after she displays her FSL license. \nTo identify the causal impact of the FSL, we compare food and non-food categories via synthetic control matching. We find the average quality of surviving food sellers has improved after partial and mandatory licensing, partly because those who are unwilling to obtain the FSL license must exit the platform. Despite an increase in seller concentration, the platform's gross merchandise value (GMV) in the food category did not decline post FSL, nor did the average sales price increase significantly one year into full enforcement of the FSL.
27884.zh_abstract: 利用阿里巴巴的专有数据，我们研究了2015年《食品安全法》如何影响中国的电子商务。《食品安全法》要求电子商务平台上的大多数食品销售者获得有效的在线零售食品经营许可证。由于《食品安全法》是逐步推行的，我们难得有机会观察到从自愿认证到部分许可再到强制许可的渐进过渡。数据总结显示，在拥有有效许可信息的卖家中，那些在《食品安全法》实施前拥有更好在线声誉和更多在线食品销售的卖家更倾向于在平台上更早展示其《食品安全法》许可证，而买家在卖家展示其《食品安全法》许可证后更愿意与其交易。为了识别《食品安全法》的因果影响，我们通过合成控制匹配比较了食品和非食品类别。我们发现，在部分许可和强制许可之后，幸存食品卖家的平均质量有所提高，部分原因是那些不愿获得《食品安全法》许可证的卖家必须退出平台。尽管卖家集中度有所增加，但平台在食品类别的总商品交易额在《食品安全法》实施后并未下降，且在《食品安全法》全面实施一年后，平均销售价格也未显著上涨。

27883.title: Renegotiation in Debt Chains
27883.abstract: We develop a tractable model of strategic debt renegotiation in which businesses are sequentially interconnected through their liabilities. This financing structure, which we refer to as a debt chain, gives rise to externalities as a lender’s willingness to provide concessions to his privately-informed borrower depends on how this lender’s own liabilities are expected to be renegotiated. Our analysis reveals how targeted government subsidies and debt reductions as well as incentives for early renegotiation following large economic shocks such as COVID-19 or a financial crisis can prevent default waves.
27883.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个易于处理的战略债务重新谈判模型，其中企业通过其负债顺序相互连接。这种融资结构（我们称之为债务链）产生了外部性，因为贷款人向掌握私人信息的借款人提供让步的意愿取决于该贷款人自身的负债预计将如何被重新谈判。我们的分析揭示了，在COVID-19或金融危机等大规模经济冲击之后，有针对性的政府补贴和债务减免以及早期重新谈判的激励措施如何能够防止违约浪潮。
27883.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ME；JEL：G21, G32, G33, G38

27882.title: A Cost/Benefit Analysis of Clinical Trial Designs for COVID-19 Vaccine Candidates
27882.zh_title: COVID-19候选疫苗临床试验设计的成本效益分析
27882.authors: Donald A. Berry, Scott Berry, Peter Hale, Leah Isakov, Andrew W. Lo, Kien Wei Siah, Chi Heem Wong
27882.abstract: We compare and contrast the expected duration and number of infections and deaths averted among several designs for clinical trials of COVID-19 vaccine candidates, including traditional randomized clinical trials and adaptive and human challenge trials. Using epidemiological models calibrated to the current pandemic, we simulate the time course of each clinical trial design for 504 unique combinations of parameters, allowing us to determine which trial design is most effective for a given scenario. A human challenge trial provides maximal net benefits—averting an additional 1.1M infections and 8,000 deaths in the U.S. compared to the next best clinical trial design—if its set-up time is short or the pandemic spreads slowly. In most of the other cases, an adaptive trial provides greater net benefits.
27882.zh_abstract: 我们比较和对比了几种COVID-19候选疫苗临床试验设计的预期持续时间以及避免的感染和死亡人数，包括传统的随机临床试验、适应性试验和人类挑战试验。使用根据当前大流行校准的流行病学模型，我们模拟了每种临床试验设计在504种独特参数组合下的时间进程，从而能够确定在给定情景下哪种试验设计最有效。如果人类挑战试验的设置时间短或大流行传播缓慢，则其提供最大的净效益——与次优的临床试验设计相比，在美国额外避免了110万例感染和8000例死亡。在大多数其他情况下，适应性试验提供更大的净效益。

27881.title: The Distribution of COVID-19 Related Risks
27881.authors: Patrick Baylis, Pierre-Loup Beauregard, Marie Connolly, Nicole Fortin, David A. Green, Pablo Gutierrez Cubillos, Sam Gyetvay, Catherine Haeck, Timea Laura Molnar, Gaëlle Simard-Duplain, Henry E. Siu, Maria teNyenhuis, Casey Warman
27881.abstract: This paper documents two COVID-related risks, viral risk and employment risk, and their distributions across the Canadian population. The measurement of viral risk is based on the VSE COVID Risk/Reward Assessment Tool, created to assist policymakers in determining the impacts of economic shutdowns and re-openings over the course of the pandemic. We document that women are more concentrated in high viral risk occupations and that this is the source of their greater employment loss over the course of the pandemic so far. They were also less likely to maintain one form of contact with their former employers, reducing employment recovery rates. Low educated workers face the same virus risk rates as high educated workers but much higher employment losses. Based on a rough counterfactual exercise, this is largely accounted for by their lower likelihood of switching to working from home which, in turn, is related to living conditions such as living in crowded dwellings. For both women and the low educated, existing inequities in their occupational distributions and living situations have resulted in them bearing a disproportionate amount of the risk emerging from the pandemic. Assortative matching in couples has tended to exacerbate risk inequities.
27881.zh_abstract: 本文记录了两种与COVID相关的风险，即病毒风险和就业风险，及其在加拿大人口中的分布。病毒风险的测量基于VSE COVID风险/回报评估工具，该工具旨在帮助政策制定者确定大流行期间经济关闭和重新开放的影响。我们记录到，女性更集中于高病毒风险职业，这是她们在大流行期间迄今遭受更大就业损失的原因。她们也更不可能与前雇主保持一种形式的联系，从而降低了就业恢复率。低教育水平工人面临与高教育水平工人相同的病毒风险率，但就业损失却高得多。基于一个粗略的反事实练习，这主要是由于他们转向居家办公的可能性较低，而这又与居住条件（如居住在拥挤的住房中）有关。对于女性和低教育水平者而言，其职业分布和居住状况中现有的不平等导致他们承担了大流行中出现的过大比例的风险。夫妻间的选型匹配往往加剧了风险不平等。
27881.meta: Programs：EFG, EH, LS；JEL：E32, I18, J15, J16, J21

27880.title: Incentivizing Negative Emissions Through Carbon Shares
27880.zh_title: 通过碳份额激励负排放
27880.abstract: I analyze a novel climate policy instrument that attaches a transferable asset to each unit of carbon in the atmosphere. I show that this instrument improves on an emission tax by incentivizing both optimal emission reductions and optimal removal of past emissions. Emitters post a bond equal to the worst-case social cost of carbon, and the regulator deducts damages as they are realized over time. Quantitatively, a bond that is double the optimal emission tax is sufficient to provide optimal carbon removal incentives in 95% of cases.
27880.zh_abstract: 我分析了一种新颖的气候政策工具，该工具将一种可转让资产附加到大气中的每单位碳上。我表明，该工具通过激励最优的减排和最优的过去排放清除，改进了排放税。排放者缴纳一笔等于最坏情况社会碳成本的债券，监管机构随着时间推移扣除实际发生的损害。定量分析表明，在95%的情况下，相当于最优排放税两倍的债券足以提供最优的碳清除激励。

27879.title: Using Satellite Imagery to Understand and Promote Sustainable Development
27879.zh_title: 利用卫星图像理解和促进可持续发展
27879.authors: Marshall Burke, Anne Driscoll, David Lobell, Stefano Ermon
27879.abstract: Accurate and comprehensive measurements of a range of sustainable development outcomes are fundamental inputs into both research and policy. We synthesize the growing literature that uses satellite imagery to understand these outcomes, with a focus on approaches that combine imagery with machine learning. We quantify the paucity of ground data on key human-related outcomes and the growing abundance and resolution (spatial, temporal, and spectral) of satellite imagery. We then review recent machine learning approaches to model-building in the context of scarce and noisy training data, highlighting how this noise often leads to incorrect assessment of models’ predictive performance. We quantify recent model performance across multiple sustainable development domains, discuss research and policy applications, explore constraints to future progress, and highlight key research directions for the field.
27879.zh_abstract: 一系列可持续发展成果的准确和全面测量是研究和政策的基本输入。我们综合了利用卫星图像理解这些成果的日益增长的文献，重点关注将图像与机器学习相结合的方法。我们量化了关键人类相关成果地面数据的匮乏以及卫星图像日益增长的丰富性和分辨率（空间、时间和光谱）。然后，我们回顾了在训练数据稀缺且有噪声的背景下最近的机器学习建模方法，强调这种噪声如何常常导致对模型预测性能的错误评估。我们量化了最近模型在多个可持续发展领域的性能，讨论了研究和政策应用，探讨了未来进展的制约因素，并强调了该领域的关键研究方向。

27878.title: A Toolkit for Solving Models with a Lower Bound on Interest Rates of Stochastic Duration
27878.zh_title: 求解具有随机持续期限利率下限的模型的工具包
27878.authors: Gauti B. Eggertsson, Sergey K. Egiev, Alessandro Lin, Josef Platzer, Luca Riva
27878.abstract: This paper presents a toolkit to solve for equilibrium in economies with the effective lower bound (ELB) on the nominal interest rate in a computationally efficient way under a special assumption about the underlying shock process, a two-state Markov process with an absorbing state. We illustrate the algorithm in the canonical New Keynesian model, replicating the optimal monetary policy in Eggertsson and Woodford (2003), as well as showing how the toolkit can be used to analyse the medium-scale DSGE model developed by the Federal Reserve Bank of New York. As an application, we show how various policy rules perform relative to the optimal commitment equilibrium. A key conclusion is that previously suggested policy rules – such as price level targeting and nominal GDP targeting – do not perform well when there is a small drop in the price level, as observed during the Great Recession, because they do not imply sufficiently strong commitment to low future interest rates (“make-up strategy”). We propose two new policy rules, Cumulative Nominal GDP Targeting Rule and Symmetric Dual-Objective Targeting Rule that are more robust. Had these policies been in place in 2008, they would have reduced the output contraction by approximately 80 percent. If the Federal Reserve had followed Average Inflation Targeting – which can arguably approximate the new policy framework announced in August 2020 – the output contraction would have been roughly 25 percent smaller.
27878.zh_abstract: 本文提供了一个工具包，用于在关于潜在冲击过程（一个具有吸收状态的两状态马尔可夫过程）的特殊假设下，以计算高效的方式求解名义利率存在有效下限的经济体中的均衡。我们在经典的新凯恩斯模型中说明了该算法，复制了Eggertsson和Woodford（2003）的最优货币政策，并展示了该工具包如何用于分析纽约联邦储备银行开发的中等规模DSGE模型。作为一个应用，我们展示了各种政策规则相对于最优承诺均衡的表现。一个关键结论是，先前提出的政策规则——如价格水平目标和名义GDP目标——在价格水平小幅下降时（如大衰退期间所观察到的）表现不佳，因为它们没有意味着对未来低利率的足够强承诺（“弥补策略”）。我们提出了两个新的政策规则，即累积名义GDP目标规则和对称双目标目标规则，它们更加稳健。如果这些政策在2008年实施，它们本可以将产出收缩减少约80%。如果美联储遵循平均通胀目标——这可以说近似于2020年8月宣布的新政策框架——产出收缩本可以减少约25%。

27874.title: Opening the Door: Immigrant Legalization and Family Reunification in the United States
27874.zh_title: 打开大门：美国移民合法化与家庭团聚
27874.authors: Elizabeth U. Cascio, Ethan G. Lewis
27874.abstract: Does opening the door to U.S. citizenship for unauthorized immigrants cause out- of-control “chain migration”? We address this question using variation from the legalization programs of the Immigration Reform and Control Act of 1986 (IRCA). Exploiting IRCA’s introduction and differences across metropolitan areas in program intensity, we estimate that each IRCA-legalized Mexican was responsible for the subsequent immigration and legal admission of one relative – in total – through 2019. Most sponsored relatives were immediate family, and the adult sponsorship rate is inconsistent with out-of-control chain migration. Estimates using cross-country variation are substantively similar and suggest limited demand for reunification of extended families.
27874.zh_abstract: 为无证移民打开美国公民身份之门是否会导致失控的“连锁移民”？我们利用1986年《移民改革与控制法》合法化计划带来的变化来回答这个问题。利用《移民改革与控制法》的引入以及不同大都市区在计划强度上的差异，我们估计，每个通过《移民改革与控制法》合法化的墨西哥人，到2019年总共负责了随后一位亲属的移民和合法入境。大多数被担保的亲属是直系亲属，成年人的担保率与失控的连锁移民不一致。使用跨国差异的估计在实质上相似，并表明对大家庭团聚的需求有限。
